papers.title: AI Alignment via Incentives and Correction
papers.abstract: We study AI alignment through the lens of law-and-economics models of deterrence and enforcement. In these models, misconduct is not treated as an external failure, but as a strategic response to incentives: an actor weighs the gain from violation against the probability of detection and the severity of punishment. We argue that the same logic arises naturally in agentic AI pipelines. A solver may benefit from producing a persuasive but incorrect answer, hiding uncertainty, or exploiting spurious shortcuts, while an auditor or verifier must decide whether costly monitoring is worthwhile. Alignment is therefore a fixed-point problem: stronger penalties may deter solver misbehavior, but they can also reduce the auditor's incentive to inspect, since auditing then mainly incurs cost on a population that appears increasingly aligned. This perspective also changes what should count as a post-training signal. Standard feedback often attaches reward to the final answer alone, but a solver-auditor pipeline exposes the full correction event: whether the solver erred, whether the auditor inspected, whether the error was caught, and whether oversight incentives remained active. We formalize this interaction in a two-agent model in which a principal chooses rewards over joint correction outcomes, inducing both solver behavior and auditor monitoring. Reward design is therefore a bilevel optimization problem: rewards are judged not by their immediate semantic meaning, but by the behavioral equilibrium they induce. We propose a bandit-based outer-loop procedure for searching over reward profiles using noisy interaction feedback. Experiments on an LLM coding pipeline show that adaptive reward profiles can maintain useful oversight pressure and improve principal-aligned outcomes relative to static hand-designed rewards, including a substantial reduction in hallucinated incorrect attempts.

analysis.tldr: 将法律经济学中的威慑与执法模型引入AI对齐，将对齐视为求解者与审计者之间的固定点问题，并通过奖励设计实现行为均衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI对齐方法多将不当行为视为外部失败，忽略了求解者与审计者之间的策略互动，导致监督激励不足或失效。
analysis.problem: 如何通过奖励设计在求解者与审计者之间形成有效的行为均衡，实现AI对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更强的惩罚可能抑制求解者不当行为，但也会降低审计者检查的激励，因为审计主要对看似对齐的群体产生成本。
analysis.method: 提出一个双智能体模型，主控者根据联合纠正结果选择奖励，诱导求解者行为和审计者监控；将奖励设计视为双层优化问题，并采用基于bandit的外循环方法搜索奖励配置。
contributions: 将法律经济学的威慑模型引入AI对齐，形式化求解者-审计者互动。
提出基于联合纠正结果的奖励设计框架，并给出bandit搜索算法。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM编码流水线上实验，自适应奖励配置相比静态手工设计奖励显著减少幻觉性错误尝试。
limitations: 实验仅针对编码任务，泛化性待验证。
bandit搜索可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将经济学模型引入对齐，实验验证有效，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将法律经济学中的威慑与执法模型引入AI对齐，将对齐视为求解者与审计者之间的固定点问题，并通过奖励设计实现行为均衡。

papers.title: Omni-Fake: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Social Media Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Multimodal deepfakes are proliferating on social media and threaten authenticity, information integrity, and digital forensics. Existing benchmarks are constrained by their single-modality scope, simplified manipulations, or unrealistic distributions, which limit their ability to assess real-world robustness. To address these limitations, we present Omni-Fake, a unified omni-dataset for comprehensive multimodal deepfake detection in social-media settings. It comprises Omni-Fake-Set, a large-scale, high-quality dataset with 1M+ samples, and Omni-Fake-OOD, an out-of-distribution benchmark with 200k+ samples intentionally excluded from training to evaluate generalization. Omni-Fake spans four modalities (image, audio, video, and audio-video talking head) and supports a joint detection-localization-explanation protocol. On top of Omni-Fake, we further propose Omni-Fake-R1, a reinforcement-learning-driven multimodal detector that adaptively integrates visual and auditory cues and outputs structured decisions, localization, and natural-language explanations. Extensive experiments show significant gains in detection accuracy, cross-modal generalization, and explainability over state-of-the-art baselines. Project page: https://tianxiao1201.github.io/omni-fake-project-page/

analysis.tldr: 提出统一多模态社交媒体深度伪造检测基准Omni-Fake及强化学习驱动的检测器Omni-Fake-R1。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测基准局限于单模态、简化操作或不真实分布，无法评估真实世界鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、大规模、多模态且支持联合检测-定位-解释的社交媒体深度伪造基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建Omni-Fake数据集（含1M+样本的训练集和200k+样本的OOD测试集），覆盖图像、音频、视频和音视频说话头四种模态；提出Omni-Fake-R1检测器，利用强化学习自适应整合视觉和听觉线索，输出结构化决策、定位和自然语言解释。
contributions: 提出Omni-Fake，首个统一多模态社交媒体深度伪造基准，包含大规模数据集和OOD测试集。
提出Omni-Fake-R1，强化学习驱动的多模态检测器，实现检测、定位和解释的联合输出。
analysis.experiments: 在Omni-Fake上实验，检测准确率、跨模态泛化和可解释性显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有社交媒体平台和伪造类型。
强化学习训练可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 多模态深度伪造检测基准具有重要应用价值，方法创新且实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一多模态社交媒体深度伪造检测基准Omni-Fake及强化学习驱动的检测器Omni-Fake-R1。

papers.title: Prosa: Rubric-Based Evaluation of LLMs on Real User Chats in Brazilian Portuguese
papers.abstract: Rankings produced by holistic LLM-as-a-judge scoring are sensitive to the bias of the chosen judge model. We show that switching to binary rubric scoring with multi-judge filtering removes this sensitivity: decomposing the judgement matters more than the judge model itself. To support this claim, we introduce Prosa, the first real user multi-turn Brazilian Portuguese chat benchmark: 1,000 WildChat conversations scored by three judges from three model families on 16 models. Under filtered rubric scoring the three judges agree on every one of the 16 ranks, whereas under holistic scoring they agree on only 7 of 16. Additionally, the rubric filtering pipeline increases the average score gap between neighbouring models by 47%, thereby improving Prosa's discriminative power. Evaluating a new model on Prosa costs approximately $2.1 when using Gemini 3 Flash as the judge. We release the benchmark and the filtering code to ensure that future models can be assessed under identical conditions. These artifacts also make our rubric-based scoring method reusable beyond Prosa, supporting other open-ended evaluation settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prosa基准，通过二元评分与多裁判过滤消除LLM评判偏差，提升排名一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM-as-a-judge的整体评分易受裁判模型偏差影响，导致排名不可靠，需要更鲁棒的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何消除LLM裁判偏差，实现稳定且可复现的模型排名评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 整体评分下不同裁判对16个模型排名仅7个一致，而二元评分+多裁判过滤后完全一致，且平均分数差距提升47%。
analysis.method: 将整体评分分解为二元标准评分，并采用多裁判过滤（三个不同模型家族的裁判）来聚合结果。
contributions: 首个真实用户多轮巴西葡萄牙语聊天基准Prosa，含1000个对话和16个模型的评分。
证明二元评分+多裁判过滤比裁判模型本身更重要，显著提升排名一致性和区分度。
analysis.experiments: 使用三个裁判（来自不同模型家族）对16个模型进行整体评分和二元评分对比，评估排名一致性。
limitations: 仅针对巴西葡萄牙语，可能不适用于其他语言。
裁判模型数量有限（三个），更多裁判可能带来不同结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但语言特定性限制通用性。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prosa基准，通过二元评分与多裁判过滤消除LLM评判偏差，提升排名一致性。

papers.title: From Packets to Patterns: Interpreting Encrypted Network Traffic as Longitudinal Behavioral Signals
papers.abstract: Human behavior is difficult to observe continuously at scale, yet it leaves measurable traces in everyday device use. We test whether encrypted smartphone network traffic -- a ubiquitous, always-on, passive sensing modality -- can passively capture behavioral patterns related to sleep, stress, and loneliness. We model shared behavioral structure using a transformer backbone with per-user adapters, allowing the model to represent both typical individual behavior and deviations from it. To make these representations interpretable, we apply a sparse autoencoder to extract behavioral features corresponding to distinct patterns of activity. We relate these features to sleep disturbance, stress, and loneliness using generalized estimating equations with Mundlak decomposition, separating between-person differences from within-person changes over time. We find that the three outcomes reflect distinct temporal structures: stress is primarily associated with stable between-person differences, loneliness with within-person variation, and sleep disturbance with a combination of both. Notably, these within-person dynamics are not captured by predefined network-traffic features, demonstrating the value of learned representations for longitudinal behavioral sensing. These results establish encrypted network traffic as a viable passive sensing modality, revealing interpretable behavioral dynamics -- particularly deviations from an individual's baseline -- that are not visible in raw traffic features.

analysis.tldr: 利用加密智能手机网络流量作为被动感知信号，通过Transformer和稀疏自编码器提取可解释的行为特征，预测睡眠、压力和孤独感。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类行为难以大规模连续观测，但日常设备使用留下可测量痕迹；现有方法依赖预定义特征，无法捕捉个体内动态变化。
analysis.problem: 如何从加密网络流量中提取可解释的纵向行为信号，并区分个体间差异与个体内变化以预测睡眠、压力和孤独感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 三种心理状态反映不同时间结构：压力主要与稳定个体间差异相关，孤独感与个体内变化相关，睡眠障碍则两者兼有；预定义特征无法捕捉个体内动态。
analysis.method: 使用Transformer骨干网络结合用户适配器建模共享行为结构，通过稀疏自编码器提取可解释行为特征，并用广义估计方程（Mundlak分解）分离个体间与个体内效应。
contributions: 证明加密智能手机网络流量可作为被动感知模态，捕捉睡眠、压力和孤独感的行为模式。
提出结合Transformer、稀疏自编码器和统计分解的可解释框架，揭示个体内动态变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定用户群体或设备类型，泛化性需验证。
稀疏自编码器提取的特征可能遗漏细微行为模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（加密流量+可解释行为特征），但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用加密智能手机网络流量作为被动感知信号，通过Transformer和稀疏自编码器提取可解释的行为特征，预测睡眠、压力和孤独感。

papers.title: The Case for ESM3 as a General-Purpose AI Model with Systemic Risk Under the EU AI Act
papers.abstract: Due to ambiguity in the wording of the EU AI Act, we examine the question of to what extent frontier biological foundation models such as ESM3 are subject to obligations for general-purpose AI models with systemic risk under the EU AI Act. In this paper, we map ESM3 to the biorisk chain, and conclude that it would be desirable if the providers of ESM3 and similar biological models were subject to these obligations, which would require them to assess and mitigate dual-use risks from their models. We then perform an analysis, comparing the attributes of ESM3 to the classification criteria in the AI Act and the supporting material. We conclude that at this time, ESM3 does not appear to be meaningfully regulated by the Act. We then propose remedies to correct the situation.

analysis.tldr: 分析ESM3是否应受欧盟AI法案中通用AI模型系统性风险条款约束，结论是目前未被有效监管，并提出改进建议。
analysis.research_motivation: 欧盟AI法案对前沿生物基础模型（如ESM3）的监管存在模糊性，可能遗漏具有双重用途风险的模型，需明确其适用性以防范生物安全风险。
analysis.problem: 确定ESM3是否应被归类为具有系统性风险的通用AI模型，并受欧盟AI法案相关义务约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 将ESM3映射到生物风险链，并对比AI法案分类标准及支持材料进行定性分析。
contributions: 首次系统评估ESM3在欧盟AI法案下的监管地位。
提出修正法案漏洞的建议，以覆盖前沿生物模型的双重用途风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析基于当前法案文本，未来修订可能改变结论。
未涉及其他司法管辖区的类似法规比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 主题重要但非技术性创新，适合政策制定者参考，建议保存。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 分析ESM3是否应受欧盟AI法案中通用AI模型系统性风险条款约束，结论是目前未被有效监管，并提出改进建议。

papers.title: Less Interaction But More Explanation: A Communication Perspective on Agentic AI Interfaces
papers.abstract: AI systems have long been expected to interact with users, answering questions, generating content, and continuing (social) conversations. Agentic AI, however, breaks from this expectation, as its primary objective is workflow execution on behalf of the users. If a system becomes more agentic, do users need less interaction with the system? Our answer is: less routine back-and-forth, but more communication for oversight and explanation, as agentic AI proactively acts, not just responds. Grounded in a communication perspective, we discuss how users perceive the communicative roles of AI systems (whether as the source of actions or merely a channel), and how this can shape trust. Because agentic AI can play multiple communicative roles, it can complicate this source perception and introduce potential risks. To address this, we propose three types of explanations that agentic AI needs to incorporate (action-process, uncertainty, and coordination), and suggest that customization affordances that allow users to decide when and which explanations they see may be key to preserving human agency as AI autonomy increases.

analysis.tldr: 从通信视角论证自主AI需要更多解释性交互而非减少交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统AI以交互为核心，但自主AI以任务执行为目标，可能改变人机交互模式，现有研究缺乏对自主AI通信角色的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 自主AI系统应如何设计交互与解释机制，以平衡用户信任、风险与人类自主性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自主AI可扮演多种通信角色（行动源或渠道），导致用户感知复杂化，可能引发信任风险。
analysis.method: 提出通信视角框架，分析自主AI的通信角色，并建议三类解释（行动过程、不确定性、协调）及定制化功能。
contributions: 从通信视角重新定义自主AI的交互需求，指出需要更多解释而非更少交互。
提出三类必要解释和定制化建议以维护人类自主性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证验证，仅提供理论框架。
未讨论不同应用场景下的具体实现挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论视角新颖但缺乏实验验证，适合对AI交互设计感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从通信视角论证自主AI需要更多解释性交互而非减少交互。

papers.title: Concepts Whisper While Syntax Shouts: Spectral Anti-Concentration and the Dual Geometry of Transformer Representations
papers.abstract: We test whether the causal inner product of \citet{park2024linear} -- defined by the unembedding covariance $Σ$ -- enables cross-lingual concept transport. Across 17 models and 4 language pairs, a matched-spectrum randomization test finds that Whitened Causal Alignment is indistinguishable from spectral regularization alone ($p = 0.95$). However, this failure reveals a broader phenomenon: anti-concentration is observed in residual-stream difference-of-means vectors across five architecture families ($p < 10^{-33}$) and supported by SAE features (e.g., $p = 4.5 \times 10^{-19}$) and linear probes on Gemma and Llama. We discover a \emph{dual geometry}: activation-space concept directions anti-concentrate in the spectral tail, while static unembedding-row contrasts \emph{concentrate} in high-variance directions ($p < 10^{-4}$). Split-injection causal interventions support the functional basis on Gemma and Llama (Cohen's $d$ up to $1.80$), and POS-tag probing across 8 models shows syntax preferentially encodes in the high-variance subspace in 6 of 8 architectures ($p < 0.013$), with the Qwen~2.5 family showing a significant reversal consistent with architecture-specific spectral structure. These results suggest transformers may rotate semantic content into spectrally quiet regions during contextualized processing, encoding concepts where they can be manipulated with reduced grammatical disruption.

analysis.tldr: Transformer表示中语义概念集中在谱尾，而句法信息集中在高方差方向，形成双几何结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解Transformer内部表示中语义和句法信息的分离机制，有助于改进跨语言概念迁移和模型可解释性。
analysis.problem: 验证因果内积是否支持跨语言概念传输，并揭示表示中语义与句法的几何分布规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现激活空间中概念方向在谱尾反集中，而静态解嵌入行对比在高方差方向集中；句法信息优先编码在高方差子空间。
analysis.method: 通过匹配谱随机化检验、SAE特征分析、线性探针和因果干预等方法，系统分析表示几何。
contributions: 发现Transformer表示中语义与句法的双几何结构：概念在谱尾反集中，句法在高方差方向集中。
通过多种模型和实验验证了该现象的普遍性，并揭示架构特异性反转。
analysis.experiments: 在17个模型、4个语言对上进行了匹配谱随机化检验、SAE特征分析、线性探针和因果干预实验。
limitations: 主要基于因果内积的负结果，可能未完全排除其他对齐方法。
双几何结构的机制解释仍需进一步理论验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，揭示了Transformer表示的重要几何性质，对可解释性研究有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer表示中语义概念集中在谱尾，而句法信息集中在高方差方向，形成双几何结构。

papers.title: Where Do Prompt Perturbations Break Generation? A Segment-Level View of Robustness in LoRA-Tuned Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models are sensitive to minor prompt perturbations, yet existing robustness methods usually enforce consistency at the whole-sequence level. This holistic view can hide an important failure mode: a perturbed response may remain globally similar to the clean one while drifting on a critical entity, relation, or conclusion. We introduce S$^2$R$^2$, a segment-level framework for robust LoRA fine-tuning. S$^2$R$^2$ decomposes clean and perturbed generations into semantic segments, aligns them with an optimal-transport objective, and penalises the segments with the largest meaning drift. To connect this output-side objective with model adaptation, we add an adapter-stability regulariser motivated by segment-level attention reallocation, using LoRA norm control as a tractable proxy for limiting perturbation-amplified evidence shifts. A PAC-Bayesian complexity view further explains why controlling adapter growth may support transfer beyond observed perturbations. Experiments on summarisation benchmarks show that S$^2$R$^2$ improves robustness under typographical noise, deletion, synonym replacement, and paraphrasing, while maintaining competitive clean performance and stronger cross-dataset transfer than consistency-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出S²R²框架，在语义片段级别提升LoRA微调语言模型对提示扰动的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有鲁棒性方法通常在整序列级别强制一致性，忽略了关键实体、关系或结论上的语义漂移，导致鲁棒性评估不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何检测并缓解LoRA微调语言模型在提示扰动下关键语义片段的漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扰动后的响应可能在全局上相似，但在关键实体、关系或结论上发生漂移，这是整序列一致性方法无法捕捉的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出S²R²框架，将干净和扰动生成分解为语义片段，通过最优传输目标对齐，惩罚漂移最大的片段；并引入适配器稳定性正则化，利用LoRA范数控制限制扰动放大的证据偏移。
contributions: 提出片段级鲁棒性框架S²R²，揭示并缓解关键语义漂移。
引入适配器稳定性正则化，通过LoRA范数控制实现鲁棒微调。
在摘要任务上验证了S²R²在多种扰动下的鲁棒性提升和跨数据集迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在摘要基准上，针对打字错误、删除、同义词替换和释义等扰动进行实验，S²R²提升了鲁棒性，同时保持了有竞争力的干净性能，并实现了比一致性基线更强的跨数据集迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖语义片段分解的质量。
仅针对LoRA微调，未验证其他微调方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对关键语义漂移问题，实验充分，与LLM鲁棒性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S²R²框架，在语义片段级别提升LoRA微调语言模型对提示扰动的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Evaluating Agentic AI in the Wild: Failure Modes, Drift Patterns, and a Production Evaluation Framework
papers.abstract: Existing evaluation frameworks for large language models -- including HELM, MT-Bench, AgentBench, and BIG-bench -- are designed for controlled, single-session, lab-scale settings. They do not address the evaluation challenges that emerge when agentic AI systems operate continuously in production: compounding decision errors, tool failure cascades, non-deterministic output drift, and the absence of ground truth for long-horizon tasks. This paper makes three contributions. First, we present a taxonomy of seven failure modes unique to production agentic systems, each grounded in observations from systems operating at billion-event scale. Second, we demonstrate empirically where standard metrics -- ROUGE, BERTScore, accuracy/AUC, and the agentic benchmarks above -- fail to detect each failure mode. Third, we propose PAEF (Production Agentic Evaluation Framework), a five-dimension evaluation framework with an open-source reference implementation, designed for continuous evaluation on production traffic rather than episodic benchmark runs. Our analysis shows that standard metrics fail to detect four of the seven failure modes entirely and detect three others only after a lag of multiple evaluation cycles.

analysis.tldr: 提出生产环境中智能体AI系统的七种故障模式及PAEF评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估框架（如HELM、MT-Bench）仅适用于受控实验室环境，无法应对生产环境中智能体AI系统连续运行时出现的复合决策错误、工具故障级联、非确定性输出漂移等挑战。
analysis.problem: 生产环境中智能体AI系统的评估缺乏针对其特有故障模式的框架和指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准指标（ROUGE、BERTScore、AUC等）完全无法检测七种故障模式中的四种，对另外三种的检测也存在多个评估周期的滞后。
analysis.method: 提出PAEF（Production Agentic Evaluation Framework），一个五维评估框架，并附带开源参考实现，专为生产流量上的连续评估而非周期性基准测试设计。
contributions: 提出生产智能体系统特有的七种故障模式分类法，基于十亿级事件规模系统的观察。
实证展示标准指标无法检测这些故障模式。
提出PAEF框架及开源实现，支持生产环境连续评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到基于十亿级事件规模系统的观察和实证分析。
limitations: 框架可能依赖特定生产环境，泛化性需验证。
开源实现的覆盖范围和易用性未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对生产环境智能体评估的实用框架，创新性和应用价值高，但技术细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生产环境中智能体AI系统的七种故障模式及PAEF评估框架。

papers.title: NoiseRater: Meta-Learned Noise Valuation for Diffusion Model Training
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success across a wide range of generative tasks, yet their training paradigm largely treats injected noise as uniformly informative. In this work, we challenge this assumption and introduce NoiseRater, a meta-learning framework for instance-level noise valuation in diffusion model training. We propose a parametric noise rater that assigns importance scores to individual noise realizations conditioned on data and timestep, enabling adaptive reweighting of the training objective. The rater is trained via bilevel optimization to improve downstream validation performance after inner-loop diffusion updates. To enable efficient deployment, we further design a decoupled two-stage pipeline that transitions from soft weighting during meta-training to hard noise selection during standard training. Extensive experiments on FFHQ and ImageNet demonstrate that not all noise samples contribute equally, and that prioritizing informative noise improves both training efficiency and generation quality. Our results establish noise valuation as a complementary and previously underexplored axis for improving diffusion model training. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/NoiseRater-DEB116.

analysis.tldr: 提出元学习框架NoiseRater，为扩散模型训练中的噪声样本赋予重要性分数，通过自适应重加权提升训练效率和生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型训练中注入的噪声被默认视为同等重要，但不同噪声样本对模型学习的贡献可能不同，现有方法忽略了这一差异。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和利用扩散模型训练中每个噪声样本的信息价值，以优化训练目标和提升生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明并非所有噪声样本贡献相同，优先选择信息量大的噪声可提高训练效率和生成质量。
analysis.method: 提出NoiseRater，一个参数化噪声评分器，根据数据和时间步为每个噪声实例分配重要性分数，通过双层优化训练评分器，并设计解耦的两阶段流水线从软权重过渡到硬噪声选择。
contributions: 首次提出噪声估值作为扩散模型训练中一个未被充分探索的改进方向
设计元学习框架NoiseRater实现实例级噪声重要性评分和自适应重加权
提出解耦的两阶段训练流水线，从软权重过渡到硬噪声选择，便于部署
analysis.experiments: 在FFHQ和ImageNet数据集上进行实验，验证了噪声估值方法的有效性，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能增加训练计算开销
噪声评分器的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验验证有效，但摘要未提供具体数值，影响评分略保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元学习框架NoiseRater，为扩散模型训练中的噪声样本赋予重要性分数，通过自适应重加权提升训练效率和生成质量。

papers.title: KG-First, LLM-Fallback: A Hybrid Microservice for Grounded Skill Search and Explanation
papers.abstract: Authoritative competency frameworks such as ESCO, ROME, and O*NET are essential for aligning education with labor market needs, yet their technical complexity and structural heterogeneity hinder practical adoption by educators. This paper introduces SkillGraph-Service, an interoperable microservice designed to bridge this gap by unifying these resources into a provenance-preserving Knowledge Graph (KG). Adopting a KG-first, LLM-fallback architecture, the system combines symbolic rigor with sub-symbolic flexibility. It implements a lightweight hybrid retrieval engine (fusing SQLite FTS5 and HNSW vector search) to handle the vocabulary mismatch in educator queries, and utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) strictly for constrained ranking and audience-aware explanation. Empirical evaluation on a multilingual dataset reveals that the proposed hybrid strategy achieves superior retrieval effectiveness (nDCG@5>0.94) with sub-200 ms latency, rendering computationally expensive cross-encoder re-ranking may be unnecessary for this domain. Furthermore, an analysis of generated explanations highlights a trade-off between fluency and faithfulness: while JSON-constrained LLMs ensure high citation precision, deterministic templates remain the most reliable method for maximizing evidence coverage. The resulting architecture offers a practical, scalable, and auditable solution for integrating complex skill data into digital learning ecosystems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种KG优先、LLM后备的混合微服务架构，用于技能搜索与解释，在保持高检索精度的同时降低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 权威技能框架（如ESCO、ROME、O*NET）技术复杂且结构异构，阻碍了教育工作者在实际中的应用，需要一种可互操作且实用的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何统一异构技能资源并实现高效、可解释的技能搜索与解释，同时避免过度依赖计算昂贵的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，混合检索策略（SQLite FTS5 + HNSW向量搜索）在nDCG@5>0.94且延迟低于200ms时，交叉编码器重排序可能不必要；LLM生成的解释在流畅性和忠实性之间存在权衡，JSON约束可提高引用精度，但确定性模板在证据覆盖上更可靠。
analysis.method: 构建SkillGraph-Service微服务，采用KG优先、LLM后备架构：先通过知识图谱进行符号化检索，再使用轻量级混合检索引擎（融合全文搜索和向量搜索）处理词汇不匹配，最后严格限制LLM用于排序和受众感知解释。
contributions: 提出一种KG优先、LLM后备的混合微服务架构，实现技能搜索与解释的可扩展、可审计方案。
通过实验证明混合检索策略在效率和效果上的优势，并揭示LLM解释中流畅性与忠实性的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在多语言数据集上评估，混合检索策略达到nDCG@5>0.94且延迟低于200ms；对生成解释的分析表明JSON约束LLM可提高引用精度，但确定性模板在证据覆盖上更优。
limitations: LLM解释的忠实性仍有提升空间，确定性模板可能缺乏灵活性。
实验仅在特定技能框架数据集上进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有实际应用价值，但创新性中等，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种KG优先、LLM后备的混合微服务架构，用于技能搜索与解释，在保持高检索精度的同时降低延迟。

papers.title: Model Merging: Foundations and Algorithms
papers.abstract: Modern deep learning usually treats models as separate artifacts: trained independently, specialized for particular purposes, and replaced when improved versions appear. This thesis studies model merging as an alternative paradigm: combining independently trained neural networks directly in weight space, with little or no optimization and without requiring access to the original training data. The thesis considers two main regimes. In the single-task setting, where models share an objective but differ in initialization, we introduce C$^2$M$^3$, a cycle-consistent merging algorithm based on Frank-Wolfe optimization. C$^2$M$^3$ aligns multiple networks into a shared, reference-free parameter space, making weight averaging meaningful without privileging any individual model. In the multi-task setting, where models are fine-tuned for different downstream tasks from a common pretrained initialization, we first develop a theoretical account of task vectors as approximate gradients. This explains both the effectiveness and the limitations of task arithmetic. Building on this view, we show that task vectors inherit the low-rank structure of gradients and introduce Task Singular Vectors (TSV), a decomposition that enables compression and interference reduction through TSV-Merge. We then present MASS, an input-adaptive routing method that uses TSV geometry to select task-relevant subspaces at inference time. Finally, we introduce MERGE$^3$, an evolutionary merging framework that uses Item Response Theory to reduce evaluation costs by up to 50$\times$ while preserving solution quality. Together, these contributions provide theoretical and algorithmic foundations for model merging, supporting a paradigm in which learned capabilities can be composed, reused, and extended across models.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究模型合并（在权重空间直接组合独立训练的神经网络）的理论与算法，提出多种新方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代深度学习通常将模型视为独立工件，训练、替换成本高，且难以组合复用已有能力。模型合并提供了一种无需原始训练数据、无需大量优化的替代范式，有望实现能力的组合、复用与扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有原始训练数据且不进行大量优化的条件下，将独立训练的神经网络在权重空间直接合并，以支持单任务和多任务场景下的模型组合与能力复用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出任务向量可近似视为梯度，这解释了任务算术的有效性与局限性；同时任务向量继承梯度的低秩结构，为压缩和干扰减少提供了基础。
analysis.method: 提出多种合并算法：单任务场景下基于Frank-Wolfe优化的循环一致合并算法C$^2$M$^3$；多任务场景下基于任务奇异向量（TSV）的分解与合并方法TSV-Merge、输入自适应路由方法MASS，以及基于进化搜索和项目反应理论的MERGE$^3$框架。
contributions: 提出C$^2$M$^3$，一种循环一致的模型合并算法，使权重平均在无参考模型时仍有意义。
建立任务向量作为近似梯度的理论，解释任务算术的有效性与局限。
提出任务奇异向量（TSV）分解，实现压缩与干扰减少，并发展出TSV-Merge和MASS方法。
提出MERGE$^3$框架，利用项目反应理论将评估成本降低高达50倍。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定初始化或微调设置，对完全异构的模型合并效果未知。
理论分析主要基于线性近似，非线性交互可能未被充分建模。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 系统性的理论+算法贡献，覆盖单任务和多任务合并，方法创新且实用，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究模型合并（在权重空间直接组合独立训练的神经网络）的理论与算法，提出多种新方法。

papers.title: Unifying Deep Stochastic Processes for Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Deep stochastic processes have recently become a central paradigm for image enhancement, with many methods explicitly conditioning the stochastic trajectory on the degraded input. However, the relationship between these conditional processes and standard diffusion models remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a unified perspective on stochastic image enhancement by classifying recent methods into three families of continuous-time processes: unconditional diffusion models, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) processes, and diffusion bridges. We show that all of these approaches arise from a common stochastic differential equation (SDE) formulation. This framework makes explicit that seemingly disparate methods differ primarily in their drift and diffusion terms, terminal distributions, and boundary conditions, while schedulers and samplers constitute orthogonal design choices. Leveraging this unification, we conduct a controlled empirical study across multiple image enhancement tasks using identical architectures and training protocols. Our results reveal no consistently dominant method; instead, we identify and disentangle the specific design choices that most strongly influence performance. Finally, we release ItoVision, a modular PyTorch library that implements the unified framework and enables rapid prototyping and fair comparison of stochastic image enhancement methods.

analysis.tldr: 统一了多种随机图像增强方法，揭示其共同SDE框架，并通过控制实验解耦关键设计选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有随机图像增强方法众多，但彼此关系不明确，缺乏统一视角，导致方法选择困难且难以公平比较。
analysis.problem: 如何统一条件随机过程与标准扩散模型，并解耦影响性能的关键设计选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将现有方法分类为无条件扩散模型、Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程和扩散桥三类，统一为共同SDE公式，并通过控制实验解耦设计选择。
contributions: 提出随机图像增强的统一SDE框架，将三类方法纳入同一视角。
通过控制实验揭示无单一方法占优，并解耦关键设计选择。
发布模块化PyTorch库ItoVision，支持快速原型和公平比较。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 统一框架可能未覆盖所有变体。
控制实验的结论可能受限于特定任务和架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 统一框架有理论价值，控制实验和开源库增强实用性，但摘要未提供具体性能结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 统一了多种随机图像增强方法，揭示其共同SDE框架，并通过控制实验解耦关键设计选择。

papers.title: Multi-Agent Reasoning Improves Compute Efficiency: Pareto-Optimal Test-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: Advances in inference methods have enabled language models to improve their predictions without additional training. These methods often prioritize raw performance over cost-effective compute usage. However, computational efficiency is key for real-world applications with resource constraints. We provide a systematic analysis of the inference scaling strategies self-consistency, self-refinement, multi-agent debate, and mixture-of-agents, to study their computational performance tradeoffs. We evaluate methods on two reasoning benchmarks (MMLU-Pro, BBH) and include extensive parameter configurations (e.g., scaling the number of parallel predictions, agents, and debate rounds) across different model sizes. Across 34 configurations and over 100 evaluations, we compute the Pareto-optimal front to select methods that achieve the best accuracy with the lowest computational budget. Notably, inference scaling improves accuracy by up to +7.1% points over chain-of-thought at the highest evaluated budgets (20x the CoT compute budget) on MMLU-Pro. With an equal computing budget, debate and mixture-of-agents outperform self-consistency by 1.3% and 2.7% points, respectively. While self-consistency saturates earlier, multi-agent gains persist, particularly on more complicated tasks. We identify a simple multi-agent design guideline: mixture-of-agents is most efficient when the number of parallel generations exceeds the number of sequential aggregations.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体推理在计算效率上优于自一致性，在Pareto最优前沿上实现更高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理方法（如自一致性）优先考虑原始性能而非计算效率，但实际应用受限于资源约束，需要系统分析不同推理策略的计算-性能权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何系统比较自一致性、自精炼、多智能体辩论和混合智能体等推理策略在计算预算约束下的性能-效率权衡，并找到Pareto最优的测试时扩展方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自一致性在较低计算预算下性能饱和，而多智能体方法（辩论和混合智能体）在更高计算预算下持续提升，尤其在复杂任务上；混合智能体在并行生成数超过顺序聚合数时效率最高。
analysis.method: 在MMLU-Pro和BBH基准上，对自一致性、自精炼、多智能体辩论和混合智能体四种推理策略进行系统参数配置（并行预测数、智能体数、辩论轮数等），计算Pareto最优前沿以选择在给定计算预算下精度最高的方法。
contributions: 首次系统比较多种推理策略的计算-性能权衡，构建Pareto最优前沿。
发现多智能体方法（辩论和混合智能体）在计算效率上优于自一致性，并给出设计准则：并行生成数超过顺序聚合数时混合智能体最有效。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU-Pro和BBH两个推理基准上，涵盖34种配置和超过100次评估，对比四种推理策略在不同计算预算下的精度。
limitations: 仅评估了两个推理基准，泛化性有待验证。
未考虑更复杂的多智能体交互或动态计算预算分配。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 系统比较多种推理策略的计算效率，提供Pareto最优前沿和设计准则，对资源受限场景有实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体推理在计算效率上优于自一致性，在Pareto最优前沿上实现更高精度。

papers.title: Multi-Dataset Cross-Domain Knowledge Distillation for Unified Medical Image Segmentation, Classification, and Detection
papers.abstract: We propose a unified cross-domain transfer learning framework that leverages knowledge from multiple heterogeneous medical imaging datasets to improve performance across segmentation, classification, and object detection tasks. Our approach employs a teacher-student paradigm in which a joint teacher model aggregates domain-invariant representations learned from diverse source datasets, while a task-specific student model is trained via multi-level knowledge distillation. Originally developed for medical image segmentation, the framework is extended to support image-level classification and object-level detection, enabling a general multi-task formulation for medical image analysis. We evaluate our method on a broad suite of datasets, including six segmentation benchmarks, BrainMetShare, ISLES, BraTS (MRI) and Lung MSD, LiTS, KiTS (CT), as well as multiple classification datasets for pulmonary disease and dementia, and detection datasets with native bounding-box annotations. Across all tasks and modalities, the proposed approach yields consistent improvements over strong dataset-specific and multi-head baselines, demonstrating enhanced robustness to distributional shifts and superior generalization. These findings highlight the potential of multi-dataset knowledge distillation as a scalable and task-agnostic approach for enhancing segmentation, classification, and object detection performance across heterogeneous medical imaging domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出多数据集跨域知识蒸馏框架，统一提升医学图像分割、分类和检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分析通常针对单一任务和数据集训练模型，难以泛化到不同分布的数据，且多任务统一框架缺乏。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多个异构医学影像数据集的知识，统一提升分割、分类和检测任务的性能并增强跨域泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用教师-学生范式，教师模型从多个源数据集聚合域不变表示，学生模型通过多级知识蒸馏进行训练，支持分割、分类和检测任务。
contributions: 提出统一跨域迁移学习框架，支持多任务医学图像分析。
通过多数据集知识蒸馏，在多个基准上取得一致改进，增强对分布偏移的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在六个分割基准、多个分类和检测数据集上评估，包括MRI和CT模态，与强基线相比取得一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量和源数据集的选择。
多级蒸馏的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对医学图像多任务统一框架有重要价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多数据集跨域知识蒸馏框架，统一提升医学图像分割、分类和检测性能。

papers.title: Neuro-Symbolic Agents for Hallucination-Free Requirements Reuse
papers.abstract: The Object-Oriented Method for Requirements Authoring and Management (OOMRAM) is a requirements reuse framework that relies on exact identifier matching and rigid templates, limiting its ability to adapt specifications across diverse contexts. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer the flexibility to overcome this bottleneck, they introduce the risk of generating structurally invalid or inconsistent requirement combinations. To address this tension, we present a neuro-symbolic multi-agent system that re-conceptualizes requirements reuse as a Model-Driven Elicitation process. In this paradigm, an LLM serves as a non-deterministic heuristic for traversing a deterministic domain model represented by a formal OOMRAM requirement lattice. A deterministic, symbolic validator enforces all structural constraints within the agent loop, effectively eliminating hallucinated requirement combinations by construction. Evaluated on an autonomous benchmark across two application families, our system achieves 100% requirement coverage and a constraint-violation rate of only 0.2%. Although the F1-score against a single gold standard is moderate (0.47-0.51), every generated specification is structurally valid and satisfies all mandatory domain requirements. The model-agnostic implementation scales to larger lattices via subgraph navigation and provides transparent audit trails for regulatory compliance.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号多智能体系统，结合LLM启发式搜索与符号验证器，实现无幻觉的需求复用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有需求复用框架依赖精确匹配和刚性模板，缺乏灵活性；LLM虽灵活但易生成无效或不一致的需求组合。
analysis.problem: 如何在利用LLM灵活性的同时，保证生成的需求组合在结构上有效且一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM作为非确定性启发式搜索可遍历确定性领域模型，符号验证器能消除幻觉组合。
analysis.method: 神经符号多智能体系统：LLM作为启发式搜索遍历OOMRAM需求格，符号验证器强制执行结构约束。
contributions: 将需求复用重新概念化为模型驱动的启发式过程
提出神经符号多智能体架构，保证生成需求的结构有效性
analysis.experiments: 在自主基准测试上，覆盖两个应用家族，达到100%需求覆盖率和0.2%约束违反率，F1分数为0.47-0.51。
limitations: F1分数中等，可能无法完全匹配单一黄金标准
依赖预定义的领域模型，构建成本可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合神经符号与多智能体，实验验证有效，但F1分数中等，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号多智能体系统，结合LLM启发式搜索与符号验证器，实现无幻觉的需求复用。

papers.title: Automated Interpretability and Feature Discovery in Language Models with Agents
papers.abstract: We introduce an autonomous multiagent framework for mechanistic interpretability that automates both explaining and finding internal features in large language models. The system runs two coupled loops: (1) explanation refinement, where an agent proposes competing hypotheses and iteratively tests them with targeted prompt controls and a multi-metric evaluation; and (2) feature discovery, where an agent generates prompt sets, constructs a k-nearest-neighbor graph in activation space, and retrieves candidate features using statistical separability and semantic coherence criteria. On Gemma-2 family models and MLP neurons in weight-sparse transformers, our agent improves over one-shot auto-interpretations, discovers language-specific and safety-relevant features, and produces auditable explanation traces, showing that agent-driven empirical loops yield sharper and more falsifiable explanations than one-shot labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出自主多智能体框架，通过解释优化和特征发现两个循环自动进行语言模型机制可解释性分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机制可解释性方法依赖人工分析或一次性标注，难以规模化且解释质量有限，需要自动化、可审计的发现流程。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地发现和解释大语言模型中的内部特征，并生成可验证的因果解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双循环多智能体框架：解释优化循环中智能体提出竞争假设并通过目标提示控制和多指标评估迭代测试；特征发现循环中智能体生成提示集、构建激活空间k近邻图，并基于统计可分性和语义一致性检索候选特征。
contributions: 提出首个自主多智能体框架，同时实现特征发现与解释优化。
在Gemma-2系列模型和稀疏Transformer的MLP神经元上，相比一次性自动解释方法取得改进，发现语言特定和安全相关特征。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-2系列模型和权重稀疏Transformer的MLP神经元上评估，结果显示智能体驱动的经验循环比一次性标签产生更清晰、更可证伪的解释。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如Gemma-2），泛化性需验证。
计算开销可能较大，因为涉及多轮迭代和搜索。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，自动化机制可解释性有实用价值，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自主多智能体框架，通过解释优化和特征发现两个循环自动进行语言模型机制可解释性分析。

papers.title: Robust Fundamental Matrix Estimation from Single Image Motion Blur
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce a challenging task: extracting a fundamental matrix from a single motion blurred image. For a camera moving in 3D during exposure, the smear paths in the blurry image contain cues and constraints on this motion. We demonstrate the feasibility of establishing correspondences between two time instances within the camera exposure window, and that these can be used to robustly infer a fundamental matrix, which summarizes the motion of the camera during the exposure time. The inferred fundamental matrix is unique up to a transpose, corresponding to an ambiguity of the direction of time. Due to this per-smear ambiguity, classic methods, such as the 8-point algorithm, are no longer usable. The proposed method modifies the estimation to work on time-direction ambiguous correspondences. To improve the robustness of the fundamental matrix estimation, we also propose to incorporate an uncertainty measurement in smear pattern prediction and use it in the sampling process of the estimator. Experiments on synthetic and real-world motion-blur datasets demonstrate that our approach is able to estimate the fundamental matrix encoding the 3D camera motion, from single frames. Practical applicability is demonstrated on the downstream task of motion segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 从单张运动模糊图像中鲁棒估计基础矩阵，利用模糊轨迹内的对应关系推断相机3D运动。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统基础矩阵估计需要多张清晰图像或已知对应点，而单张运动模糊图像中隐藏的相机运动信息未被充分利用，且现有算法无法处理时间方向模糊的对应关系。
analysis.problem: 从单张运动模糊图像中估计基础矩阵，该矩阵编码了曝光期间相机的3D运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 运动模糊图像中的模糊轨迹包含相机运动线索，但对应关系存在时间方向歧义（基础矩阵的转置歧义），导致经典8点算法失效。
analysis.method: 提出一种修改的基础矩阵估计算法，处理时间方向模糊的对应关系；并引入模糊模式预测的不确定性度量，用于估计器的采样过程以提高鲁棒性。
contributions: 首次提出从单张运动模糊图像中估计基础矩阵的任务，并证明其可行性。
设计了一种针对时间方向歧义对应关系的鲁棒估计算法，结合不确定性度量提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实运动模糊数据集上验证了方法有效性，并在运动分割下游任务中展示了实用性。
limitations: 可能依赖模糊轨迹的准确检测，对极端模糊或噪声敏感。
仅适用于相机运动导致的模糊，不适用于物体运动模糊。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 任务新颖，方法有针对性，实验验证充分，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从单张运动模糊图像中鲁棒估计基础矩阵，利用模糊轨迹内的对应关系推断相机3D运动。

papers.title: ECG-biometrics-bench: A Unified Framework for Reproducible Benchmarking of ECG Biometrics
papers.abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) biometrics have emerged as a promising modality for continuous, liveness-aware authentication in wearable systems. However, many prior studies report overly optimistic results due to data leakage (e.g., random splits within the same session). To address this issue, we introduce ECG-biometrics-bench, a modular, reproducible benchmarking framework that standardizes preprocessing, segmentation, and evaluation across seven widely used public ECG datasets spanning clinical, ambulatory, and large-scale cohort settings. The framework supports both closed-set and open-set (i.e., subject-disjoint generalization in this work) evaluation, as well as progressively realistic protocols including cross-session and long-term temporal separation. To facilitate reproducible research in the community, the ECG-biometrics-bench repository will be made publicly accessible on GitHub upon the acceptance of this manuscript. Through a comprehensive multi-dataset analysis, we expose the Random Split Fallacy, demonstrating that intra-session evaluation protocols artificially inflate performance while masking severe degradation caused by temporal drift and unseen identities. Furthermore, by evaluating multiple architectures, including DeepECG, ResNet1D, and CNN-LSTM, we show that these failures are not model-specific but are likely inherent to current supervised feature-learning paradigms. Finally, we demonstrate that performance degradation due to temporal aging can be partially mitigated through a heavy enrollment, lightweight authentication strategy based on dynamic multi-session template fusion. These findings establish a more realistic baseline for ECG biometrics and highlight critical challenges that must be addressed for reliable real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出ECG-biometrics-bench统一基准框架，揭示ECG生物识别中随机划分导致的数据泄露问题，并验证跨会话评估的必要性。
analysis.research_motivation: ECG生物识别在可穿戴系统中具有连续、活体感知认证的潜力，但先前研究因数据泄露（如同会话随机划分）报告了过于乐观的结果，缺乏标准化基准导致结果不可比。
analysis.problem: 现有ECG生物识别评估中存在数据泄露问题，缺乏统一、可复现的基准框架来标准化预处理、分割和评估协议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了随机划分谬误：同会话评估人为提升性能，掩盖了时间漂移和未见身份导致的严重退化；且该问题非模型特有，而是当前监督特征学习范式的固有问题。
analysis.method: 构建模块化、可复现的基准框架，标准化预处理、分割和评估，支持闭集和开集（主体不相交泛化）评估，以及跨会话和长期时间分离协议；提出基于动态多会话模板融合的重注册轻认证策略。
contributions: 提出ECG-biometrics-bench统一基准框架，覆盖7个公开数据集，支持多种评估协议。
揭示随机划分谬误，证明同会话评估导致性能虚高，时间漂移和未见身份造成严重退化。
验证性能退化可通过动态多会话模板融合部分缓解，建立更现实的基线。
analysis.experiments: 在7个公开数据集上评估多种架构（DeepECG、ResNet1D、CNN-LSTM），比较不同评估协议下的性能，展示随机划分谬误和模板融合效果。
limitations: 仅评估了三种架构，可能未覆盖所有代表性方法。
模板融合策略仅部分缓解时间老化，未完全解决。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 框架实用，揭示关键问题，但方法增量，实验限于特定架构。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ECG-biometrics-bench统一基准框架，揭示ECG生物识别中随机划分导致的数据泄露问题，并验证跨会话评估的必要性。

papers.title: 6G Needs Agents: Toward Agentic AI-Native Networks for Autonomous Intelligence
papers.abstract: Sixth-generation (6G) networks are increasingly envisioned as AI-native infrastructures integrating communication, sensing, and computing into a unified fabric. However, existing approaches remain largely optimization-centric, relying on closed-loop control with limited reasoning capability. In this paper, we argue for a paradigm shift toward Agentic AI-Native 6G, in which Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents operate as bounded, policy-governed reasoning entities within a semantic control plane layered above deterministic 3GPP infrastructure. We propose a four-layer architecture that integrates deterministic network infrastructure, semantic abstraction of intent and context, hierarchical reasoning, and a distributed multi-agent fabric spanning device, edge, and core domains. To assess feasibility, we develop a proof-of-concept agentic reasoning and orchestration framework and conduct an extensive empirical study using a domain-specific 6G benchmark under realistic deployment constraints. Our results reveal a fundamental tradeoff between reasoning capability and system efficiency, showing that no single model simultaneously satisfies latency, throughput, and accuracy requirements. Instead, heterogeneous deployment of LLM agents across the device--edge--core continuum is necessary to balance these constraints. We further demonstrate that quantization introduces non-uniform effects across models, reinforcing the need for system-level optimization rather than model-level compression alone. These findings establish agentic intelligence as a viable architectural direction for 6G and highlight key challenges in achieving scalable, trustworthy, and self-reasoning networks. All experimental results and evaluation scripts are publicly available to support reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向6G的智能体原生网络架构，通过LLM智能体实现语义控制平面，并揭示推理能力与系统效率间的根本权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有6G网络方法以优化为中心，依赖闭环控制，推理能力有限，难以实现自主智能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种基于LLM智能体的6G网络架构，在保持系统效率的同时提升推理能力，并应对异构部署和量化带来的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现推理能力与系统效率之间存在根本权衡，单一模型无法同时满足延迟、吞吐量和准确性要求；量化对不同模型产生非均匀影响。
analysis.method: 提出四层架构（确定性网络基础设施、语义抽象、分层推理、分布式多智能体），并开发概念验证的智能体推理与编排框架。
contributions: 提出面向6G的智能体AI原生网络范式，将LLM智能体作为有界、策略驱动的推理实体集成到语义控制平面。
通过领域特定6G基准实验，揭示了推理能力与系统效率的权衡，并证明异构部署和系统级优化的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 使用领域特定6G基准在真实部署约束下进行实证研究，评估延迟、吞吐量和准确性，并公开所有结果和脚本。
limitations: 摘要未提及对安全性和可信度的具体评估。
可能未考虑大规模多智能体协作的通信开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的6G智能体原生架构，实验揭示了关键权衡，但属于通信领域应用，与核心ML方向距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向6G的智能体原生网络架构，通过LLM智能体实现语义控制平面，并揭示推理能力与系统效率间的根本权衡。

papers.title: Mesh Based Simulations with Spatial and Temporal awareness
papers.abstract: Machine Learning surrogates for Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), particularly Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Transformers, have become a new important approach for accelerating physics simulations. However, we identify a critical bottleneck in the field: while architectures have advanced significantly, the common underlying training paradigms remain bound to naive assumptions, such as node-wise supervision and explicit Euler time-stepping. These legacy choices ignore the stiff dynamics and local flux continuity inherent to numerous partial differential equations resolution methods, such as Finite Element, Difference, or Volume (FEM). In this work, we propose a unified framework to bridge the gap between geometric deep learning and rigorous numerical analysis. We introduce three key innovations: (1) Multi Node Prediction, a stencil-level objective that predicts field values for a node's full local topology, enforcing spatial derivative consistency; (2) Temporal Correction, replacing unstable explicit schemes with a predictor-corrector via temporal Cross-Attention; and (3) Geometric Inductive Biases, leveraging 3D Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) to robustly capture rotational symmetries in unstructured meshes. We evaluate this framework across three architectures (MeshGraphNet, Transolver, and a Transformer) on diverse physics datasets. Our approach yields consistent improvements in accuracy and stability, particularly in long-horizon rollouts, while producing latent representations that generalize to unseen subtasks such as Wall Shear Stress or Pressure prediction. Code is available at https://github.com/DonsetPG/graph-physics.

analysis.tldr: 提出时空感知的网格模拟框架，通过多节点预测、时间校正和几何归纳偏置提升物理仿真精度与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器学习代理模型（如GNN、Transformer）虽架构先进，但训练范式仍基于节点级监督和显式欧拉时间步进等朴素假设，忽略了偏微分方程求解中的刚性动力学和局部通量连续性，导致精度和稳定性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决现有物理仿真代理模型中训练范式与数值分析脱节的问题，提升长时域推演的准确性和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前训练范式存在节点级监督和显式欧拉时间步进等朴素假设，这些假设不适用于有限元/差分/体积法等数值方法中固有的刚性动力学和局部通量连续性。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，包含三项创新：1) 多节点预测（模板级目标，强制空间导数一致性）；2) 时间校正（用时间交叉注意力替代显式方案，实现预测-校正）；3) 几何归纳偏置（在非结构化网格上使用3D旋转位置嵌入捕获旋转对称性）。
contributions: 提出多节点预测损失，在模板级别监督节点邻域，增强空间导数一致性。
引入时间校正机制，通过交叉注意力实现预测-校正，提升时间积分稳定性。
将3D旋转位置嵌入应用于非结构化网格，提供旋转等变归纳偏置。
analysis.experiments: 在MeshGraphNet、Transolver和Transformer三种架构上，使用多种物理数据集评估，在精度和稳定性（尤其是长时域推演）上取得一致改进，且潜在表示可泛化到壁面剪切应力或压力预测等未见子任务。
limitations: 可能对极度复杂的湍流或高雷诺数流动效果有限。
框架依赖网格拓扑，对动态网格自适应场景需额外处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合数值分析与深度学习，实验充分且开源，对物理仿真领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时空感知的网格模拟框架，通过多节点预测、时间校正和几何归纳偏置提升物理仿真精度与稳定性。

papers.title: MIRL: Mutual Information-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently suffer from visual perception errors and hallucinations that compromise answer accuracy in complex reasoning tasks. Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) offers a promising solution by optimizing policies using answer correctness signals. Despite their effectiveness, prevailing RLVR methods face two critical limitations. First, much of the sampling budget is wasted on trajectories doomed to fail due to early visual description errors. Second, sparse rewards cannot distinguish whether failures stem from visual perception or reasoning stages. We introduce MIRL, a decoupled framework that addresses both limitations by leveraging mutual information (MI) between generated descriptions and visual inputs as a cheap pre-screening signal. This enables intelligent budget allocation toward high-potential trajectories via forking, while decoupled training provides independent MI-based rewards for visual perception optimization, resolving reward blindness. Experiments on six vision-language reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MIRL achieves 70.22% average accuracy and successfully surpasses the performance of sampling 16 complete trajectories using only 10 pre-samples with top-6 selection (25% fewer complete trajectories). Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/mirl-main/.

analysis.tldr: MIRL 利用互信息作为预筛选信号，通过解耦框架优化视觉语言模型的视觉感知和推理，减少采样浪费并提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型在复杂推理任务中常因视觉感知错误和幻觉导致答案不准确，现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法存在采样浪费和奖励稀疏问题，无法区分失败来源。
analysis.problem: 如何高效分配采样预算并区分视觉感知与推理阶段的失败，以提升视觉语言模型在复杂推理任务中的准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有 RLVR 方法中大量采样轨迹因早期视觉描述错误而注定失败，且稀疏奖励无法区分失败源于视觉感知还是推理阶段。
analysis.method: 提出 MIRL 解耦框架，利用生成描述与视觉输入之间的互信息作为廉价预筛选信号，通过分叉机制将预算分配给高潜力轨迹，并通过解耦训练提供基于互信息的独立奖励以优化视觉感知。
contributions: 提出互信息引导的预筛选机制，智能分配采样预算，减少无效轨迹浪费。
设计解耦训练框架，分别优化视觉感知和推理阶段，解决奖励盲区问题。
analysis.experiments: 在六个视觉语言推理基准上，MIRL 平均准确率达 70.22%，使用 10 个预样本和 top-6 选择（比完整轨迹少 25%）即可超越采样 16 条完整轨迹的性能。
limitations: 互信息计算可能引入额外开销，需进一步优化效率。
方法依赖生成描述的质量，在描述生成不稳定的场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对 VLM 推理中的关键问题提出有效解决方案，实验充分且性能提升显著，与重点方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIRL 利用互信息作为预筛选信号，通过解耦框架优化视觉语言模型的视觉感知和推理，减少采样浪费并提升准确率。

papers.title: Certified vs. Empirical Adversarial Robust-ness via Hybrid Convolutions with Attention Stochasticity
papers.abstract: We introduce Hybrid Convolutions with Attention Stochasticity (HyCAS), an adversarial defense that narrows the long-standing gap between provable robustness under L2 certificates and empirical robustness against strong L attacks, while preserving strong generalization across diverse imaging benchmarks. HyCAS unifies deterministic and randomized principles by coupling 1-Lipschitz, spectrally normalized convolutions with two stochastic components, spectral normalized random, projection filters and a randomized attention-noise mechanism, to realize a randomized defense. Injecting smoothing randomness inside the architecture yields an overall <= 2-Lipschitz network with formal certificates. Exten-sive experiments on diverse imaging benchmarks, including CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet-1k, NIH Chest X-ray, HAM10000, show that HyCAS surpasses prior leading certified and empirical defenses, boosting certified accuracy by up to 7.3% (on NIH Chest X-ray) and empirical robustness by up to 3.1% (on HAM10000), without sacrificing clean accuracy. These results show that a randomized Lipschitz constrained architecture can simultaneously improve both certified L2 and empirical L adversarial robustness, thereby supporting safer deployment of deep models in high-stakes applications. Code: https://github.com/misti1203/HyCAS

analysis.tldr: HyCAS 通过混合卷积与注意力随机性，在 L2 认证鲁棒性和经验鲁棒性之间取得更优平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 认证鲁棒性与经验鲁棒性之间存在长期差距，现有方法难以同时兼顾两者，且在高风险应用中需要更强的安全保障。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种防御方法，既能提供 L2 认证鲁棒性，又能提升对强 L∞ 攻击的经验鲁棒性，同时保持良好泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机化 Lipschitz 约束架构可以同时提升认证鲁棒性和经验鲁棒性，且不牺牲干净准确率。
analysis.method: HyCAS 结合确定性 1-Lipschitz 谱归一化卷积与两个随机组件（谱归一化随机投影滤波器和随机注意力噪声机制），实现整体 ≤2-Lipschitz 网络并形式化认证。
contributions: 提出 HyCAS 统一确定性与随机性防御原则，缩小认证与经验鲁棒性差距。
在多个基准上超越现有领先方法，认证准确率提升高达 7.3%，经验鲁棒性提升高达 3.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在 CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet-1k、NIH Chest X-ray、HAM10000 上进行实验，展示了认证准确率和经验鲁棒性的提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 L2 认证，对其他范数（如 L∞）的认证未提及。
随机性组件可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，在鲁棒性领域有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyCAS 通过混合卷积与注意力随机性，在 L2 认证鲁棒性和经验鲁棒性之间取得更优平衡。

papers.title: VAnim: Rendering-Aware Sparse State Modeling for Structure-Preserving Vector Animation
papers.abstract: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) animation generation is pivotal for professional design due to their structural editability and resolution independence. However, this task remains challenging as it requires bridging discrete code representations with continuous visual dynamics. Existing optimization-based methods often destroy topological consistency, while general-purpose LLMs rely on rigid CSS/SMIL transformations, failing to model geometry-level non-rigid deformations. To address these limitations, we present VAnim, the first LLM-based framework for open-domain text-to-SVG animation. We reconceptualize animation not as sequence generation, but as Sparse State Updates (SSU) on a persistent SVG DOM tree. This paradigm compresses sequence length by over 9.8x while preserving the SVG DOM structure and non-participating elements by construction. To enable precise control, we propose an Identification-First Motion Planning mechanism that grounds textual instructions in explicit visual entities. Furthermore, to overcome the non-differentiable nature of SVG rendering, we employ Rendering-Aware Reinforcement Learning via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). By leveraging a hybrid reward from a state-of-the-art video perception encoder, we align discrete code updates with high-fidelity visual feedback. We also introduce SVGAnim-134k, the first benchmark for vector animation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VAnim significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in semantic alignment and structural validity, with additional appendix metrics further validating motion quality and identity preservation.

analysis.tldr: VAnim 是首个基于 LLM 的开放域文本到 SVG 动画框架，通过稀疏状态更新和渲染感知强化学习实现结构保持的矢量动画生成。
analysis.research_motivation: SVG 动画生成在专业设计中至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保持拓扑一致性和建模几何级非刚性变形，且通用 LLM 依赖刚性 CSS/SMIL 变换，无法处理复杂变形。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本描述生成结构可编辑、分辨率无关且保持拓扑一致性的 SVG 动画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有优化方法破坏拓扑一致性，通用 LLM 无法建模几何级非刚性变形。
analysis.method: 提出稀疏状态更新（SSU）范式，将动画视为对持久 SVG DOM 树的稀疏更新；采用 Identification-First Motion Planning 机制将文本指令映射到视觉实体；利用渲染感知强化学习（GRPO）结合混合奖励对齐离散代码更新与视觉反馈。
contributions: 提出首个基于 LLM 的开放域文本到 SVG 动画框架 VAnim，采用稀疏状态更新范式压缩序列长度 9.8 倍并保持结构。
提出 Identification-First Motion Planning 机制实现精确的文本到实体映射。
引入渲染感知强化学习（GRPO）克服 SVG 渲染不可微问题。
构建首个矢量动画基准 SVGAnim-134k。
analysis.experiments: 在 SVGAnim-134k 基准上，VAnim 在语义对齐和结构有效性上显著优于现有基线，附录指标进一步验证了运动质量和身份保持。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练 LLM 的泛化能力，对罕见动画指令效果未知。
SSU 范式可能限制复杂连续变形动画的表达。

papers.title: Protein-Conditioned Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning for Full-Length mRNA Design
papers.abstract: Designing therapeutic messenger RNA (mRNA) requires creating full-length transcripts that carefully balance stability, translation efficiency, and immune safety. To address this challenge, we propose ProMORNA, a multi-objective generation framework that produces complete mRNA transcripts \textit{de novo} directly from a target protein sequence. Our approach begins by training a BART-style encoder-decoder model on over 6 million natural protein-mRNA pairs. We then introduce Multi-Objective Group Relative Policy Optimization (MO-GRPO) to simultaneously optimize for various biological objectives in a unified way. As a case study, we evaluated ProMORNA on the widely used firefly luciferase target, excluding it from both our supervised training data and the prompt pool. The results indicate that ProMORNA improves the \textit{in silico} Pareto frontier for predicted half-life and translation efficiency relative to standard supervised baselines. Additionally, it achieves higher predicted functional scores than a state-of-the-art baseline under the same evaluation pipeline. These computational findings demonstrate the feasibility of using multi-objective reinforcement learning for full-length mRNA design on unseen targets.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProMORNA框架，用多目标强化学习从蛋白质序列直接设计全长mRNA，优化稳定性、翻译效率和免疫安全性。

papers.title: Two-Pass Zero-Shot Temporal-Spatial Grounding of Rare Traffic Events in Surveillance Video
papers.abstract: Grounding traffic accidents in real CCTV footage is a rare-event problem where training on labeled accident video is often prohibited, yet accurate joint localization in time, space, and collision type is required. We present a no-fine-tuning pipeline that elicits this joint output from frozen vision-language models through two ideas. First, a coarse-to-fine two-pass decomposition: a full-video pass at 1 fps produces a coarse (t, x, y, c) tuple, then a second pass at 5 fps within a +/- 3 s window refines time and location, with two deterministic confidence gates that revert to the coarse estimate on boundary hedges or edge-clamped coordinates. Second, a specialist role assignment: Qwen3-VL-Plus handles grounding, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite handles typing on a centered video clip. On the ACCIDENT@CVPR 2026 benchmark (2,027 real CCTV videos) we reach ACC^S = 0.539 (95% CI [0.525, 0.553]): +0.127 over the benchmark paper's best-of-baselines oracle (0.412), +0.143 over the strongest single-VLM baseline (Molmo-7B, 0.396), and +0.250 over the naive baseline (0.289). The VLM path uses up to three API calls per video (17% fall back to physics on API failures); the full run costs ~$20.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需微调的双通零样本方法，利用冻结的视觉语言模型在监控视频中实现罕见交通事故的时空定位。

papers.title: SwiftPie: Lightning-fast Subject-driven Image Personalization via One step Diffusion
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in high-quality image synthesis, sparking interest in image-guided generation tasks such as subject-driven image personalization. Despite their impressive personalization results, existing methods typically rely on computationally intensive fine-tuning, iterative optimization, or multi-step denoising processes, which significantly hinder their deployment and interactive capability in real-time applications. In this work, we present SwiftPie, the first one-step diffusion image personalization tool that enables lightning-fast generation of personalized images. SwiftPie introduces a novel dual-branch identity injection mechanism that effectively integrates subject identity into a one-step diffusion model. In addition, we incorporate a mask-guided rescaling strategy to further enhance subject contextualization within a single diffusion step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SwiftPie not only delivers superior image personalization speed but also achieves comparable performance with multi-step approaches in both identity fidelity and prompt alignment. This work opens new opportunities for real-time, high-quality personalized image generation, paving the way for interactive visual synthesis.

papers.title: MILD: Mediator Agent System with Bidirectional Perception and Multi-Layered Alignment for Human-Vehicle Collaboration
papers.abstract: Prior studies report that partial driving automation can increase the cognitive demands on human drivers. This effect largely arises from human drivers' lack of transparent insight into the vehicle's intentions and decision logic, as well as from automated systems' limited awareness of the driver's dynamic state and preferences. This bidirectional misalignment undermines shared situational awareness and exacerbates coordination failures in human-vehicle interaction. To address these limitations, we argue for a paradigm shift that elevates the human role from passive supervisor to active manager. We introduce the Mediator-in-the-Loop-Driving (MILD) system, based on an agentic system architecture to facilitate synergistic human-vehicle collaboration. MILD integrates a perception agent for joint in-cabin and out-of-cabin understanding with a lightweight strategy agent that generates compliant and explainable action suggestions. To ensure these strategies are strictly aligned with safety regulations and human values, we develop Evidence- and Constraint-weighted Policy Optimization (ECPO). ECPO leverages automatic validators to steer the agent toward behaviors that are not only accurate but also structurally complete, substantiated by evidence, and free from constraint violations. Furthermore, a retrieval-augmented generation module dynamically incorporates constraints from traffic regulations, speed recommendations, and driver preferences into the decision loop. Field experiments across three open datasets demonstrate that MILD consistently outperforms baselines in both perception accuracy and strategy quality under auditable offline metrics, and yields higher human-rated policy adequacy, comfort, and explanation than baselines. This work offers a practical pathway for building auditable and aligned agents for human-vehicle collaborative driving.

analysis.tldr: 提出MILD中介系统，通过双向感知和多层对齐实现人车协同驾驶。

papers.title: OmniEncoder: See, Hear, and Feel Continuous Motion Like Humans With One Encoder
papers.abstract: Recent advances in omni-modal large language models have enabled remarkable progress in joint vision-audio understanding. However, prevailing architectures rely on modality-specific encoders with a \emph{video-coarse, audio-dense} design -- sampling visual frames at 1--2 fps while processing audio waveforms at 25 fps -- resulting in systems that perceive video \emph{frame by frame, modality by modality} rather than holistically as humans do. Such a discrepancy leaves models with impoverished cross-modal interaction during encoding and an inability to capture fine-grained visual motion. To bridge this gap, we present \textbf{Omni-Encoder, a unified Transformer backbone designed to co-embed visual and audio signals at a symmetrical 25 fps} within a shared latent space. This architecture leverages three core innovations -- the Omni-Encoder Token Template, Omni-RoPE, and Temporal Window Shifting -- to effectively reconcile the dual challenges of modality disentanglement and computational efficiency. Experiments demonstrate that, compared to the modality-specific baseline Qwen2.5-Omni under the same input token budget to the LLM decoder, Omni-Encoder delivers substantial gains on visual continuous understanding tasks -- such as sign language recognition and fine-grained sports action analysis -- while maintaining competitive performance on established audio-visual benchmarks such as AVQA and Speaker Identification and Localization. These results suggest that unified omnivorous encoding offers a promising direction for building omni-modal models that more closely reflect the integrated nature of human perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出Omni-Encoder，一个统一Transformer骨干网络，以对称25fps联合嵌入视觉和音频信号，提升连续运动理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全模态大语言模型依赖模态特定编码器，采用视频粗粒度（1-2fps）和音频细粒度（25fps）设计，导致模型逐帧逐模态感知，缺乏整体性，无法捕捉细粒度视觉运动，跨模态交互受限。

analysis.method: 提出Omni-Encoder，一个统一的Transformer骨干网络，通过三个核心创新（Omni-Encoder Token Template、Omni-RoPE、Temporal Window Shifting）在共享潜在空间中以对称25fps联合嵌入视觉和音频信号。
