papers.title: HoReN: Normalized Hopfield Retrieval for Large-Scale Sequential Model Editing
papers.abstract: Large language models encode vast factual knowledge that inevitably becomes outdated or incorrect after deployment, yet retraining is costly prohibitive, motivating model editing in lifelong settings that updates targeted behavior without harming the rest of the model. One line of work installs new facts by directly modifying base weights through locate-then-edit procedures, but accumulated edits progressively disrupt originally preserved knowledge, even with constraint-based projections. A complementary line leaves base weights intact and routes edits through external memory, but it faces routing challenges and its performance degrades at scale. We propose HoReN, a codebook-based parameter-preserving editor with enhanced routing built on three ideas. First, HoReN wraps a single MLP layer with a discrete key-value codebook, where each entry is interpreted simultaneously as a knowledge-memory key and a modern Hopfield stored pattern. Second, both keys and queries are projected onto the unit hypersphere so retrieval is governed by angular similarity, removing magnitude-driven mismatches between an edit prompt and its rephrasings. Third, the query is refined through damped Hopfield attractor dynamics, so paraphrases relax into the correct stored pattern's basin of attraction while unrelated queries remain undisturbed. HoReN achieves well-edited performance with consistent gains across diverse benchmarks spanning standard ZsRE, structured WikiBigEdit, and unstructured UnKE evaluations. Moreover, HoReN scales to 50K sequential edits on ZsRE with stable overall performance above 0.9, while prior editors collapse or degrade severely before reaching 10K. Our code is available at https://github.com/ha11ucin8/HoReN.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于归一化Hopfield检索的代码本模型编辑方法，实现大规模顺序编辑下稳定高性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型部署后知识会过时，重训练成本高，现有模型编辑方法在顺序编辑时性能退化严重。
analysis.problem: 如何实现大规模顺序模型编辑，同时保持编辑准确性和已有知识不受干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：定位-编辑方法累积编辑会破坏原有知识；外部记忆方法路由困难且规模增大时性能下降。
analysis.method: HoReN：在单MLP层上包裹离散键值代码本，键和查询投影到单位超球面以角度相似性检索，通过阻尼Hopfield吸引子动力学精炼查询。
contributions: 提出HoReN，一种基于代码本和归一化Hopfield检索的参数保留模型编辑方法。
在ZsRE、WikiBigEdit、UnKE基准上取得一致改进，并扩展到50K顺序编辑仍保持稳定性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准ZsRE、结构化WikiBigEdit、非结构化UnKE基准上评估，并在ZsRE上扩展到50K顺序编辑。
limitations: 可能仅适用于单层MLP的编辑，未验证多层或注意力层。
代码本容量可能限制可编辑事实数量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验规模大且效果好，与LLM对齐方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于归一化Hopfield检索的代码本模型编辑方法，实现大规模顺序编辑下稳定高性能。

papers.title: RADMI: Latent Information Aggregation as a Proxy for Model Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Epistemic uncertainty estimation is essential for identifying regions where deep learning system outputs may be unreliable. However, existing approaches require computationally expensive ensemble methods or multiple stochastic forward passes, limiting their scalability to dense prediction tasks like segmentation. We propose Resolution-Aggregated Decoder Mutual Information (RADMI), a single-pass method that estimates prediction uncertainty by measuring mutual information (MI) between consecutive decoder layers in segmentation networks. We observe that elevated inter-layer MI correlates with prediction uncertainty, as the network must integrate conflicting contextual information at ambiguous regions such as class boundaries. Evaluating on a seismic facies segmentation benchmark, RADMI achieves the highest correlation with deep ensemble uncertainty among all single-pass methods, outperforming the next-best baselines by 5.5% in Pearson and 10.7% in Spearman correlation coefficients. Compared to baselines that either lack spatial precision or demand significant computational overhead, RADMI yields sharp, boundary-localized uncertainty maps without architectural modifications. Our results suggest that linear aggregation of normalized information flow provides a principled and efficient proxy for prediction uncertainty in encoder-decoder architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出RADMI，一种单次前向传播即可估计分割模型不确定性的方法，通过测量解码器层间互信息作为不确定性代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法（如集成方法、多次随机前向传播）计算成本高，难以扩展到密集预测任务（如分割），亟需高效的单次方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加计算开销的前提下，准确估计分割网络预测的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到解码器层间互信息升高与预测不确定性相关，因为网络在模糊区域（如类别边界）需要整合冲突的上下文信息。
analysis.method: 提出Resolution-Aggregated Decoder Mutual Information (RADMI)，通过单次前向传播计算分割网络连续解码器层之间的互信息，作为不确定性估计。
contributions: 提出RADMI，一种单次前向传播的不确定性估计方法，无需架构修改或多次前向传播。
在地震相分割基准上，RADMI与深度集成不确定性的相关性在所有单次方法中最高，Pearson和Spearman相关系数分别提升5.5%和10.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在地震相分割基准上评估，与深度集成不确定性对比，报告了Pearson和Spearman相关系数。
limitations: 仅在地震相分割单一任务上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。
方法依赖解码器层间互信息，可能不适用于非编码器-解码器架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且高效，但仅在一个特定任务上验证，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RADMI，一种单次前向传播即可估计分割模型不确定性的方法，通过测量解码器层间互信息作为不确定性代理。

papers.title: Towards Visual Query Localization in the 3D World
papers.abstract: Visual query localization (VQL) aims to predict the spatio-temporal response of the most recent occurrence in a sequence given a query. Currently, most research focuses on visual query localization in 2D videos, while its counterpart in 3D space has received little attention. In this paper, we make the first attempt to address visual query localization in the 3D world by introducing a novel benchmark, dubbed 3DVQL. Specifically, 3DVQL contains 2,002 sequences with around 170,000 frames and 6.4K response track segments from 38 object categories. Each sequence in 3DVQL is provided with multiple modalities, including point clouds, RGB images, and depth images, to support flexible research. To ensure high-quality annotations, each sequence is manually annotated with multiple rounds of verification and refinement. To the best of our knowledge, 3DVQL is the first benchmark for 3D multimodal visual query localization. To facilitate comparison in subsequent research, we implement a series of representative 3D multimodal VQL baselines using point clouds and RGB images. The experimental results show that existing methods exhibit significant performance variations across different fusion modules. To encourage future research, we propose a lift-and-attention fusion algorithm named LaF, which significantly outperforms existing baseline models. Our benchmark and model will be publicly released at https://github.com/wuhengliangliang/3DVQL.

analysis.tldr: 首个3D视觉查询定位基准3DVQL，含多模态数据与基线方法，并提出LaF融合算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉查询定位研究集中于2D视频，3D空间中的对应问题尚未被探索，缺乏基准和评估方法。
analysis.problem: 解决3D世界中视觉查询定位任务，即给定查询，预测序列中最晚出现的时空响应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现现有方法在不同融合模块下性能差异显著，表明融合策略是关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出Lift-and-Attention Fusion (LaF)算法，将点云和RGB特征提升至统一空间并通过注意力融合。
contributions: 首次提出3D视觉查询定位任务并构建多模态基准3DVQL（2002序列、17万帧、6.4K响应段）。
实现多种3D多模态VQL基线方法，并分析融合模块的影响。
提出LaF融合算法，显著优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在3DVQL基准上评估多种基线方法，LaF算法表现最优，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准规模有限（38个类别），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
LaF算法在极端遮挡或稀疏点云下的鲁棒性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个3D VQL基准，方法创新且实验显示性能提升，但摘要未提供具体数值，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个3D视觉查询定位基准3DVQL，含多模态数据与基线方法，并提出LaF融合算法。

papers.title: SF20K Competition 2025: Summary and findings
papers.abstract: This report presents the results and findings of the first edition of the Short-Films 20K (SF20K) Competition, held in conjunction with the SLoMO Workshop at ICCV 2025. The competition is designed to advance story-level video understanding beyond short-clip action recognition, introducing an open-ended video question-answering task built on a corpus of amateur short films. This setup ensures that models must rely on multimodal understanding rather than memorization of popular movies. Evaluation is conducted using the SF20K-Test benchmark (95 movies, 979 question-answer pairs) and scored via LLM-QA-Eval, an automated judge based on GPT-4.1-nano. The competition attracted 22 teams and 286 submissions across two tracks: a Main Track with unrestricted model size and a Special Track limited to models under 8 billion parameters. The winning team achieved 65.7% accuracy on the Main Track and 48.7% on the Special Track, against a human performance ceiling of 91.7%. Our analysis reveals several key findings: narrative-aware, shot-level processing consistently outperforms uniform frame sampling; well-designed multi-stage pipelines using smaller models can match or exceed end-to-end inference with models over 30x larger; and subtitle quality is a dominant factor in performance. These results highlight that the primary bottleneck in long-form video QA lies in information selection and reasoning structure rather than raw model capacity, and that a substantial gap remains between current methods and human-level narrative comprehension.

analysis.tldr: 首届SF20K短片竞赛总结：叙事级视频理解中，信息选择与推理结构比模型容量更关键，字幕质量是性能主导因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频理解多聚焦短片段动作识别，缺乏对故事级长视频理解的评测，且公开数据集易被记忆，亟需推动多模态叙事理解。
analysis.problem: 长视频开放问答任务中，模型需依赖多模态理解而非记忆，当前方法在叙事理解上与人水平差距大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 叙事感知的镜头级处理优于均匀帧采样；精心设计的多阶段小模型可匹敌或超越30倍大的端到端模型；字幕质量是性能主导因素。
analysis.method: 组织竞赛，基于SF20K-Test基准（95部电影，979个问答对）和LLM-QA-Eval自动评估，设主赛道（无限制）和特殊赛道（<8B参数）。
contributions: 提出首个面向故事级视频理解的开放问答竞赛及基准SF20K-Test
揭示信息选择与推理结构是长视频QA的主要瓶颈，而非模型容量
analysis.experiments: 22支队伍286次提交，主赛道最佳65.7%准确率，特殊赛道48.7%，人类上限91.7%。
limitations: 竞赛仅基于业余短片，泛化到专业电影或不同文化背景可能受限
自动评估依赖GPT-4.1-nano，可能引入偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 竞赛总结提供了有价值的发现，但方法创新有限，适合关注长视频理解基准的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首届SF20K短片竞赛总结：叙事级视频理解中，信息选择与推理结构比模型容量更关键，字幕质量是性能主导因素。

papers.title: FT-RAG: A Fine-grained Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Complex Table Reasoning
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances Large Language Models (LLMs) by grounding responses in external knowledge during inference. However, conventiona RAG systems under-perform on structured tabular data, largely due to coarse retrieval granularity and insufficient table semantic comprehension. To address these limitations, we introduce FT-RAG, a fine-grained framework that employs knowledge association by decomposing tables into entry-level semantic units to construct a structured graph. FT-RAG employs a structural neighbor expansion mechanism to find semantically connected entities during graph retrieval, followed by multi-modal fusion to consolidate the context of table retrieval results. Further, to address the scarcity of specialized datasets in this domain, we introduce Multi-Table-RAG-Lib, a benchmark comprising 9870 QA pairs with high complexity and difficulty, curated to demand multi-table integration and text-table information fusion for reasoning. FT-RAG surpasses top-performing baselines across all metrics, achieving a 23.5\% and 59.2\% improvement in table-level and cell-level Hit Rates, respectively. Generation performance also sees a remarkable 62.2\% increase in exact value accuracy recall. These metrics verify the framework's effectiveness in factual grounding across both pure tabular and heterogeneous table-text contexts. Therefore, our method establishes a new state-of-the-art performance for complex reasoning over mixed-modality documents.

analysis.tldr: FT-RAG通过细粒度表格分解和结构图检索，显著提升了复杂表格推理的准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统RAG系统在处理结构化表格数据时表现不佳，主要由于检索粒度粗糙和表格语义理解不足，限制了LLM在复杂表格推理中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现细粒度的表格检索与语义理解，以提升RAG在复杂表格推理任务中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将表格分解为条目级语义单元构建结构图，采用结构邻居扩展机制检索语义相连实体，并通过多模态融合整合上下文。
contributions: 提出FT-RAG框架，通过细粒度表格分解和结构图检索提升复杂表格推理能力。
构建Multi-Table-RAG-Lib基准，包含9870个高复杂度QA对，支持多表集成和文本-表格融合推理。
analysis.experiments: 在表格级和单元格级命中率上分别提升23.5%和59.2%，精确值召回率提升62.2%，验证了框架在纯表格和异构表-文本场景中的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量表格分解和结构图构建，对噪声数据敏感。
基准数据集规模有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，且提供了新基准，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FT-RAG通过细粒度表格分解和结构图检索，显著提升了复杂表格推理的准确率。

papers.title: CGFformer: Cluster-Guidance Frequency Transformer for Pansharpening
papers.abstract: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) images by fusing low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) images with high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) images. However, the current mainstream frequency-based pansharpening methods employ fixed frequency filters, which cannot precisely adapt to complex and spatially diversified frequency distributions in PAN and MS images. Furthermore, existing denoising strategies insufficiently exploit frequency components for denoising and struggle to suppress various noise types accurately. To address these challenges, we propose CGFformer, a cluster-guidance frequency Transformer that focuses on varying frequency distribution and interactions between frequency and spatial components. Specifically, we design an adaptive separation module that integrates local features and non-local information through K-means clustering, enabling more precise separation of high- and low-frequency components. Subsequently, we introduce a dual-stream refinement module combined with Transformer-based cross-attention to remove various noise, allowing the network to jointly suppress frequency-relevant and irrelevant disturbances. In addition, we develop a frequency-spatial fusion module designed to enhance detail and facilitate spatial-frequency interaction, ensuring more effective reconstruction of spatial structures in the fused results. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed CGFformer achieves notable improvements over existing pansharpening approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于聚类引导的频率Transformer（CGFformer），通过自适应频率分离和双流去噪模块提升全色锐化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于频率的全色锐化方法使用固定频率滤波器，无法适应PAN和MS图像中复杂且空间多样化的频率分布；同时去噪策略未能充分利用频率成分，难以精确抑制多种噪声类型。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地分离高低频分量并有效抑制频率相关和无关的噪声，以提升全色锐化中空间细节重建和光谱保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CGFformer，包含三个核心模块：1）自适应分离模块，通过K-means聚类整合局部和非局部信息，实现更精确的高低频分离；2）双流精炼模块，结合Transformer交叉注意力去除多种噪声，联合抑制频率相关和无关干扰；3）频率-空间融合模块，增强细节并促进空间-频率交互，改善空间结构重建。
contributions: 提出自适应频率分离模块，利用K-means聚类实现更精确的高低频分量分离。
设计双流精炼模块，基于Transformer交叉注意力联合抑制频率相关和无关噪声。
开发频率-空间融合模块，增强细节重建和空间-频率交互。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，CGFformer相比现有全色锐化方法取得了显著改进。
limitations: K-means聚类可能引入额外计算开销，影响实时性。
方法在极端噪声或复杂场景下的泛化能力未在摘要中明确验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验验证有效，但属于遥感图像处理特定任务，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于聚类引导的频率Transformer（CGFformer），通过自适应频率分离和双流去噪模块提升全色锐化性能。

papers.title: SciResearcher: Scaling Deep Research Agents for Frontier Scientific Reasoning
papers.abstract: Frontier scientific reasoning is rapidly emerging as a key foundation for advancing AI agents in automated scientific discovery. Deep research agents offer a promising approach to this challenge. These models develop robust problem-solving capabilities through post-training on information-seeking tasks, which are typically curated via knowledge graph construction or iterative web browsing. However, these strategies face inherent limitations in frontier science, where domain-specific knowledge is scattered across sparse and heterogeneous academic sources, and problem solving requires sophisticated computation and reasoning far beyond factual recall. To bridge this gap, we introduce SciResearcher, a fully automated agentic framework for frontier-science data construction. SciResearcher synthesizes diverse conceptual and computational tasks grounded in academic evidence, while eliciting information acquisition, tool-integrated reasoning, and long-horizon capabilities. Leveraging the curated data for supervised fine-tuning and agentic reinforcement learning, we develop SciResearcher-8B, an agent foundation model that achieves 19.46% on the HLE-Bio/Chem-Gold benchmark, establishing a new state of the art at its parameter scale and surpassing several larger proprietary agents. It further achieves 13-15% absolute gains on SuperGPQA-Hard-Biology and TRQA-Literature benchmarks. Overall, SciResearcher introduces a new paradigm for automated data construction for frontier scientific reasoning and offers a scalable path toward future scientific agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出全自动数据构建框架SciResearcher，通过合成学术证据驱动的任务并训练8B模型，在多个前沿科学推理基准上达到新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿科学推理需要AI agent具备复杂计算与推理能力，但现有数据构建方法依赖知识图谱或网页浏览，难以处理稀疏、异构的学术文献，且无法超越事实回忆。
analysis.problem: 如何自动构建高质量、多样化的前沿科学推理数据，以训练具备信息获取、工具集成和长程推理能力的agent模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SciResearcher框架，通过合成基于学术证据的概念与计算任务，结合监督微调和agentic强化学习，训练出8B参数的基础agent模型。
contributions: 提出全自动agentic框架SciResearcher，用于前沿科学数据构建，无需人工标注。
训练出SciResearcher-8B模型，在HLE-Bio/Chem-Gold等基准上以8B参数超越多个更大规模专有agent。
analysis.experiments: 在HLE-Bio/Chem-Gold上达到19.46%准确率（新SOTA），在SuperGPQA-Hard-Biology和TRQA-Literature上分别取得13-15%绝对提升。
limitations: 仅评估了8B参数规模，更大模型效果未知。
基准覆盖领域有限（生物/化学/文献），泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（自动数据合成+强化学习），实验显示显著提升，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全自动数据构建框架SciResearcher，通过合成学术证据驱动的任务并训练8B模型，在多个前沿科学推理基准上达到新SOTA。

papers.title: MAP-Law: Coverage-Driven Retrieval Control for Multi-Turn Legal Consultation
papers.abstract: Legal consultation is a high-stakes, knowledge-intensive task that requires agents to identify relevant legal issues, retrieve authoritative support, and determine when evidence is sufficient for a recommendation. Although retrieval-augmented generation has improved grounding in legal question answering, many multi-turn legal agents still rely on fixed retrieval depth or coarse heuristic control. This often leads to either insufficient support for key legal elements or excessive retrieval that increases context burden and weakens answer focus. We propose MAP-Law, a coverage-driven framework for retrieval control in multi-turn legal consultation. MAP-Law models consultation as a controlled retrieval process over a joint structured state consisting of issue nodes, legal element nodes, and evidence nodes. After each retrieval round, the agent computes Element Coverage, Evidence Coverage, and Marginal Gain, and uses these signals to decide whether to continue retrieval, redirect the search, or generate the final response. In this way, MAP-Law turns stopping from a fixed hyperparameter into an interpretable and auditable decision aligned with legal argumentative structure. Experiments on a self-constructed dataset of 50 cases across eight labor-law scenarios show that MAP-Law with DeepSeek as the action selector achieves an Element Coverage of 0.860 using only 2.9 retrieval rounds and 5.8 evidence pieces on average. Compared with a fixed seven-round baseline, it reduces evidence volume by over 80% and retrieval rounds by 58%. Ablation results further confirm the independent contributions of coverage-driven stopping, joint graph representation, and LLM-based action selection.

analysis.tldr: 提出覆盖度驱动的检索控制框架MAP-Law，用于多轮法律咨询，通过结构化状态和覆盖度信号决定何时停止检索，显著减少冗余检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律咨询是高风险的、知识密集型任务，需要代理识别相关法律问题、检索权威支持并判断证据是否充分。现有方法依赖固定检索深度或粗粒度启发式控制，导致关键法律要素支持不足或检索过度增加上下文负担。
analysis.problem: 多轮法律咨询中如何动态控制检索过程，在保证法律要素覆盖充分的同时减少不必要的检索轮次和证据量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定检索深度或粗粒度启发式控制会导致要么关键法律要素支持不足，要么检索过度增加上下文负担并削弱回答焦点。
analysis.method: MAP-Law将咨询建模为在联合结构化状态（包含问题节点、法律要素节点和证据节点）上的受控检索过程。每轮检索后计算要素覆盖度、证据覆盖度和边际增益，据此决定继续检索、重定向搜索或生成最终回答。
contributions: 提出覆盖度驱动的检索控制框架，将停止决策从固定超参数转化为可解释、可审计的决策。
在自建数据集上验证了方法有效性，相比固定7轮基线减少80%以上证据量和58%检索轮次，同时保持高要素覆盖度。
analysis.experiments: 在自建的50个案例（涵盖8个劳动法场景）数据集上，使用DeepSeek作为动作选择器，MAP-Law平均仅需2.9轮检索和5.8条证据即达到0.860的要素覆盖度。消融实验证实了覆盖度驱动停止、联合图表示和基于LLM的动作选择的独立贡献。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（50个案例），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对劳动法场景，其他法律领域适用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性（覆盖度驱动停止），但实验规模较小，应用领域较窄，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出覆盖度驱动的检索控制框架MAP-Law，用于多轮法律咨询，通过结构化状态和覆盖度信号决定何时停止检索，显著减少冗余检索。

papers.title: Research on Vision-Language Question Answering Models for Industrial Robots
papers.abstract: A hierarchical cross-modal fusion model is proposed for vision-language question answering (VLQA) in industrial robotics, targeting the challenges of semantic ambiguity, complex environmental layouts, and domain-specific terminology common in modern manufacturing. The framework integrates advanced object detection, multi-scale visual encoding, syntactic parsing, and task-aware semantic attention to unite vision and language signals into a joint reasoning space. Region-based deep networks extract visual features, weighted embeddings aggregate, and recurrent neural parsing encodes sentence structures. Through fine-grained semantic alignment driven by adaptive fusion and cross-attention mechanisms, the system can handle operational queries, instruction steps, and anomaly detection with higher reliability. Compared to the existing VLQA benchmarks, validation experiments conducted on the IVQA and RIF benchmarks indicate improvements in semantic alignment, Top-1 accuracy, and robustness to ambiguous or procedural task queries. Ablation studies further quantify the impact of each architectural module, confirming the necessity of multi-level feature integration and context-driven gating for dependable industrial deployment. The technical advancements reported here provide core methodologies to improve the interpretability and operational effectiveness of industrial robots faced with diverse human-robot interaction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化跨模态融合模型，提升工业机器人视觉问答的语义对齐与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人视觉问答面临语义歧义、复杂环境布局和领域术语等挑战，现有方法难以可靠处理操作查询和异常检测。
analysis.problem: 如何融合视觉与语言信号，实现工业场景下高可靠性的视觉问答。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 层次化跨模态融合模型，集成目标检测、多尺度视觉编码、句法解析和任务感知语义注意力，通过自适应融合和交叉注意力实现细粒度语义对齐。
contributions: 提出层次化跨模态融合框架用于工业机器人视觉问答
在IVQA和RIF基准上验证了语义对齐和Top-1准确率的提升
analysis.experiments: 在IVQA和RIF基准上验证，包括消融实验量化各模块贡献。
limitations: 可能未在真实工业场景中部署验证
对极端光照或遮挡环境的鲁棒性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有明确创新但实验信息有限，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化跨模态融合模型，提升工业机器人视觉问答的语义对齐与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Grounding Multi-Hop Reasoning in Structural Causal Models via Group Relative Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Multi-Hop Fact Verification (MHFV) necessitates complex reasoning across disparate evidence, posing significant challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs) which often suffer from hallucinations and fractured logical chains. Existing methods, while improving transparency via Chain-of-Thought (CoT), lack explicit modeling of the causal dependencies between evidence and claims. In this work, we introduce a novel framework that grounds reasoning in a Structural Causal Model (SCM), treating verification as a constructive causal inference process. We empirically identify an "inverted U-shaped" correlation between reasoning chain length and accuracy, revealing that excessive structural complexity degrades performance. To address this, we propose a Rule-based Reinforcement Learning strategy using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). This approach dynamically optimizes the trade-off between structural depth and conciseness. Extensive experiments on HoVer and EX-FEVER demonstrate that our SCM-GRPO framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering a reliable and interpretable solution for complex fact verification.

analysis.tldr: 将多跳推理建模为结构因果模型中的因果推断，并用GRPO优化推理链长度与准确率的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 多跳事实验证需要跨分散证据进行复杂推理，LLM常出现幻觉和逻辑断裂，现有CoT方法缺乏对证据与声明间因果依赖的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模多跳推理中的因果依赖关系，并动态优化推理链的结构复杂度以提升准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现推理链长度与准确率之间存在“倒U型”相关，即过度的结构复杂性会降低性能。
analysis.method: 将事实验证建模为结构因果模型（SCM）中的因果推断过程，并采用基于规则的强化学习（GRPO）动态优化推理链的深度与简洁性。
contributions: 提出将多跳推理显式建模为结构因果模型中的因果推断，提升可解释性。
发现推理链长度与准确率的倒U型关系，并利用GRPO动态优化结构复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在HoVer和EX-FEVER数据集上，SCM-GRPO框架显著优于现有最先进基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的证据图构建。
GRPO的规则设计可能需要领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新（SCM+GRPO）且实验验证有效，与推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将多跳推理建模为结构因果模型中的因果推断，并用GRPO优化推理链长度与准确率的平衡。

papers.title: AttnRouter: Per-Category Attention Routing for Training-Free Image Editing on MMDiT
papers.abstract: We study training-free image editing on Qwen-Image-Edit-2511, a 60-block multi-modal diffusion transformer (MMDiT) that concatenates noise and source-image tokens within a single attention stream. We make three contributions. (i) We introduce KVInject, a single-forward attention manipulation that alpha-blends source-half key/value projections into the noise-half within a localized layer/step band. KVInject is simpler than the classical two-pass MasaCtrl recipe and avoids the prompt-mismatch failure mode that disables MasaCtrl on MMDiT (composite score drops 31% versus baseline). (ii) We show that no single attention operation dominates across edit types, motivating AttnRouter, a per-category routing table that dispatches edits to the operation that best preserves source structure for that type. With ground-truth categories the router improves the CLIP-T+DINO-I composite by 6.4% over the editing baseline; an automatic CLIP zero-shot classifier closes 98% of this gap despite only 55% category accuracy. (iii) Through layer-, step-, and alpha-band ablations we localize the editing-effective attention sub-circuit: K/V injection in early denoising steps (S0-7) recovers nearly all of the gain of full-step injection, while injection in early (L0-15) or late (L45-60) layer bands fails to drive editing entirely; alpha in [0.3, 0.5] is a stable sweet spot. We also report negative results that highlight what does not transfer from the UNet folklore: simple K/V rescaling never beats baseline and aggressive variants collapse generation entirely (composite 0.084). We release code, pre-computed routing tables, and a 100-sample stratified subset of ImgEdit-Bench used in all ablations.

analysis.tldr: 提出AttnRouter，通过逐类别注意力路由实现MMDiT上的免训练图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有免训练图像编辑方法（如MasaCtrl）在MMDiT架构上因提示不匹配而失效，且单一注意力操作无法适用于所有编辑类型，亟需一种简单、高效且通用的编辑方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在MMDiT（多模态扩散Transformer）上实现免训练图像编辑，并解决不同编辑类型对注意力操作需求不同的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现单一注意力操作无法在所有编辑类型上表现最优，且简单K/V缩放无法超越基线，激进变体导致生成崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出AttnRouter，一种逐类别路由表，根据编辑类型选择最优注意力操作；核心组件KVInject在单次前向中通过alpha混合源图像K/V到噪声半部，避免双前向和提示不匹配。
contributions: 提出KVInject，一种简单有效的单前向注意力操作，避免MasaCtrl的提示不匹配问题。
提出AttnRouter，基于逐类别路由表自动选择最优编辑操作，提升编辑质量。
通过消融实验定位编辑有效的注意力子电路，并发布代码、路由表和数据集子集。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-Image-Edit-2511模型和ImgEdit-Bench子集上评估，AttnRouter在已知类别下CLIP-T+DINO-I复合指标提升6.4%，自动分类器可缩小98%差距。
limitations: 路由表依赖预定义类别，自动分类器准确率仅55%，可能影响泛化。
仅针对MMDiT架构，未验证在其他扩散模型上的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对MMDiT架构有实际改进，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AttnRouter，通过逐类别注意力路由实现MMDiT上的免训练图像编辑。

papers.title: Tracing the Dynamics of Refusal: Exploiting Latent Refusal Trajectories for Robust Jailbreak Detection
papers.abstract: Representation Engineering typically relies on static refusal vectors derived from terminal representations. We move beyond this paradigm, demonstrating that refusal is a dynamic and sparse process rather than a localized outcome. Using Causal Tracing, we uncover the Refusal Trajectory-a persistent upstream signature that remains intact even when adversarial attacks (e.g., GCG) suppress terminal signals. Leveraging this, we propose SALO (Sparse Activation Localization Operator), an inference-time detector designed to capture these latent patterns. SALO effectively recovers defense capabilities against forced-decoding attacks, improving detection rates from ~0% to >90% where methods relying on terminal states perform poorly.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果追踪发现拒绝行为的动态轨迹，并利用稀疏激活定位算子SALO实现鲁棒越狱检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表示工程方法依赖终端静态拒绝向量，无法应对对抗攻击抑制终端信号的情况，导致检测失效。
analysis.problem: 如何捕捉对抗攻击下被抑制的拒绝动态轨迹，实现鲁棒的越狱检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 拒绝是一个动态稀疏过程，存在上游持久签名（拒绝轨迹），即使终端信号被攻击抑制，该轨迹仍保持完整。
analysis.method: 提出SALO（稀疏激活定位算子），利用因果追踪发现的拒绝轨迹，在推理时捕获潜在稀疏激活模式进行检测。
contributions: 揭示拒绝行为的动态稀疏本质，提出拒绝轨迹概念
设计SALO检测器，在强制解码攻击下将检测率从~0%提升至>90%
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的对抗攻击（如GCG）
稀疏激活定位的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对安全对齐关键问题，实验效果显著，但摘要未提供完整实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果追踪发现拒绝行为的动态轨迹，并利用稀疏激活定位算子SALO实现鲁棒越狱检测。

papers.title: CSGuard: Toward Forgery-Resistant Watermarking in Diffusion Models via Compressed Sensing Constraint
papers.abstract: Latent-based diffusion model watermarking embeds watermarks into generated images' latent space to enable content attribution, offering a training-free solution for intellectual property protection and digital forensics. However, these methods exhibit a critical vulnerability to the forgery attack, attackers can extract the watermark by inverting the watermarked image and re-generating it with an arbitrary prompt, thereby enabling false attribution on malicious content. In this paper, we propose the CSGuard, the first forgery-resistant watermarking schema that leverages compressed sensing to bind the watermarked image generation and verification to a secret matrix. This ensures that only users possessing the secret matrix can correctly embed or verify the image watermark, prevents the illegal users from forgery without compromising generation quality and watermark integrity. Experimental results demonstrate that CSGuard achieves strong forgery resistance, reduces the attack success rate from 100.0\% to 28.12\%, and achieve 100\% detection rate on benign watermarked images without compromising watermarking effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSGuard，利用压缩感知约束使扩散模型水印抵抗伪造攻击，将攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜在扩散模型水印易受伪造攻击，攻击者可提取水印并重新生成恶意内容，导致虚假归属，亟需鲁棒的水印方案。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散模型水印中的伪造攻击问题，防止非法用户提取水印并生成带假归属的恶意图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出潜在扩散模型水印存在关键漏洞：攻击者可通过逆映射提取水印，并用任意提示重新生成图像，实现伪造。
analysis.method: 提出CSGuard，利用压缩感知将水印图像生成和验证绑定到一个秘密矩阵，只有拥有秘密矩阵的用户才能正确嵌入或验证水印，从而阻止非法用户的伪造攻击。
contributions: 首个抗伪造的水印方案，利用压缩感知约束绑定水印过程与秘密矩阵。
实验证明CSGuard在保持生成质量和完整性的同时，将攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%，且良性水印图像检测率达100%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了实验结果：攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%，良性水印图像检测率100%，未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖秘密矩阵的安全分发与管理。
未讨论对多种扩散模型架构的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验效果显著，与扩散模型水印安全强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSGuard，利用压缩感知约束使扩散模型水印抵抗伪造攻击，将攻击成功率从100%降至28.12%。

papers.title: LIE: LiDAR-only HD Map Construction with Intensity Enhancement via Online Knowledge Distillation
papers.abstract: Online High-Definition (HD) map construction is a key component of autonomous driving. Recent methods rely on multi-view camera images for cost-effective HD map segmentation, but cameras lack depth information for accurate scene geometry. In contrast, LiDAR provides precise 3D measurements but lacks dense semantic cues. In this work, we propose LIE, LiDAR-only semantic map construction method that employ Knowledge Distillation (KD) to handle the lack of dense semantic and texture cues. Specifically, the teacher branch fuses student LiDAR features and the corresponding 2D intensity map tile to provide dense supervision for segmenting map elements using online distillation scheme. Experimental results show that our method outperforms all single-modality approaches, achieving 8.2% higher mIoU than the state-of-the-art camera-based model on nuScenes. LIE is robust over long ranges and under challenging weather and lighting, and efficiently adapts to Argoverse2 with only 10% fine-tuning, surpassing camera-based models trained on the full dataset. Source code will be available \href{https://iv.ee.hm.edu/lie/}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出LIE，一种仅用LiDAR的在线高清地图构建方法，通过知识蒸馏利用强度图增强语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线高清地图构建多依赖多视角相机图像，但相机缺乏深度信息；LiDAR虽有精确3D测量但缺少密集语义线索，因此需要一种仅用LiDAR且能获得丰富语义的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用LiDAR点云实现高精度的高清地图语义分割，克服LiDAR缺乏密集语义和纹理线索的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LIE框架，采用在线知识蒸馏：教师分支融合学生LiDAR特征与对应的2D强度图块，为学生分割提供密集监督。
contributions: 首次提出仅用LiDAR的在线高清地图构建方法，通过知识蒸馏利用强度图增强语义。
在nuScenes上超越所有单模态方法，mIoU比最先进的相机模型高8.2%。
在长距离和恶劣天气/光照下鲁棒，且仅用10%数据微调即可迁移到Argoverse2并超越全量训练的相机模型。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上评估，与单模态方法对比，报告了mIoU指标和迁移效率。
limitations: 可能依赖强度图的质量和可用性。
知识蒸馏的在线训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，在自动驾驶地图构建方向有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LIE，一种仅用LiDAR的在线高清地图构建方法，通过知识蒸馏利用强度图增强语义分割。

papers.title: Practical Limits of Autonomous Test Repair: A Multi-Agent Case Study with LLM-Driven Discovery and Self-Correction
papers.abstract: Maintaining reliable UI test suites in large-scale enterprise applications is a persistent and costly challenge. We present an industrial case study of a multi-agent autonomous testing system evaluated using anonymized execution data from a production-like enterprise UI testing prototype. The application features several hundred dynamic UI elements per screen. Built on a large language model with LangGraph orchestration, Playwright execution, and a RAG knowledge base, the system evolves from human-directed testing toward High-autonomy feature discovery and test execution: given no explicit test targets, it discovers over 100 testable features across 10 UI screens, dynamically expands coverage by an additional 15--30 features through runtime DOM analysis, and iteratively repairs failing tests without human intervention. We analyzed 300 consecutive autonomous execution reports encompassing 636 individual test-case executions across 10 distinct scenario families. The system achieved a 70% repair convergence rate at the scenario-family level, with a mean of 3.4 repair iterations to convergence. However, only 10% of scenario families succeeded on first attempt, 38% of reports failed to produce any executable test artifact, and we documented concrete instances of assertion weakening and test-case deletion used as workaround mechanisms to achieve superficial convergence. Our findings show that unrestricted autonomy leads to unstable and often misleading outcomes, while constrained autonomy transforms such systems into operationally viable workflows. Rather than advocating full autonomy, our findings suggest that reliable autonomous testing in enterprise-scale settings requires explicit constraints, validation boundaries, and human oversight to preserve semantic correctness and operational trustworthiness.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体自主测试修复在工业UI测试中面临不稳定和误导性结果，需要约束和人工监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模企业应用中的UI测试套件维护成本高昂且持续困难，现有自主测试系统缺乏可靠性保障。
analysis.problem: 研究自主测试修复在实际工业环境中的局限性，特别是无约束自主性导致的测试不稳定和语义错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无约束自主性导致70%修复收敛率但仅10%首次成功，38%报告无可用测试工件，出现断言弱化和测试删除等表面修复。
analysis.method: 基于LLM的多智能体系统，结合LangGraph编排、Playwright执行和RAG知识库，从人工引导向高自主性特征发现和测试执行演进。
contributions: 通过工业案例研究揭示了自主测试修复的实际局限，包括不稳定性和误导性结果。
提出了约束自主性的概念，强调显式约束、验证边界和人工监督的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 分析了300份连续自主执行报告，涵盖636个测试用例和10个场景族，系统在场景族级别达到70%修复收敛率，平均3.4次修复迭代。
limitations: 案例研究基于单一企业应用，泛化性有限。
未提供与其他方法的定量对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 工业案例研究有实践价值，但方法创新有限，实验规模中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体自主测试修复在工业UI测试中面临不稳定和误导性结果，需要约束和人工监督。

papers.title: Decision Boundary-aware Generation for Long-tailed Learning
papers.abstract: Long-tailed data bias decision boundaries toward head classes and degrade tail class accuracy. Diffusion-based generative augmentation address this problem by generating additional data, while head-to-tail transfer further mitigate the generator bias inherit from long-tailed dataset. However, we show that while head-to-tail transfer helps balance the decision space of the classifier, it also induces latent non-local feature mixing that entangles inter-class features, causing decision boundary overlap and tail class distribution shift. To address this, we first identify the problem of boundary ambiguity and then propose Decision Boundary-aware Generation (DBG) framework, which promotes near-boundary representation learning by generating informative near-boundary samples. Overall, DBG rebalances the long-tailed dataset while yielding more separable decision space for long-tailed learning. Across standard long-tailed benchmarks, DBG consistently improves tail class and overall accuracy with less inter-class overlap. The code of DBG is available at https://github.com/keepdigitalabc-svg/DBG.

analysis.tldr: 提出决策边界感知生成框架，通过生成近边界样本来缓解长尾学习中的边界模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 长尾数据导致决策边界偏向头部类，尾部类准确率低；现有扩散生成增强方法虽能缓解，但头尾迁移会引入特征混合，造成边界重叠和尾部类分布偏移。
analysis.problem: 长尾学习中，头尾迁移生成导致的决策边界模糊和尾部类分布偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 头尾迁移虽平衡了分类器的决策空间，但诱导了潜在的非局部特征混合，纠缠了类间特征，导致决策边界重叠和尾部类分布偏移。
analysis.method: 提出决策边界感知生成（DBG）框架，通过生成信息丰富的近边界样本来促进近边界表示学习，从而重新平衡长尾数据集并产生更可分离的决策空间。
contributions: 首次识别了长尾学习中头尾迁移生成导致的边界模糊问题。
提出了DBG框架，通过生成近边界样本有效缓解边界重叠和分布偏移。
在标准长尾基准上，DBG一致提升了尾部类和整体准确率，并减少了类间重叠。
analysis.experiments: 在标准长尾基准上进行了实验，DBG一致提升了尾部类和整体准确率，并减少了类间重叠。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖于生成模型的质量和近边界样本的判别能力。
未讨论在极端长尾或大规模数据集上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较好，但实验细节不足，影响和相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出决策边界感知生成框架，通过生成近边界样本来缓解长尾学习中的边界模糊问题。

papers.title: Quaternion Nonlinear Transform-Induced Nuclear Norm for Low-Rank Tensor Completion
papers.abstract: Tensor completion has emerged as a powerful framework for recovering missing data in multidimensional signals by exploiting low-rank tensor structures. Among existing approaches, linear transform-based tensor nuclear norm (TNN) methods have achieved considerable success by enforcing low-rankness on transformed frontal slices. However, the low-rank structure revealed by linear transforms remains inherently limited. To better capture intrinsic correlations, nonlinear transform-based TNN (NTTNN) models have been proposed, significantly enhancing low-rank representation through composite transforms. Despite their effectiveness, existing NTTNN methods are restricted to real-valued tensors and fail to model quaternion-valued data, which are essential for preserving inter-channel dependencies in color images and videos. Extending nonlinear TNN models to the quaternion domain is challenging due to the non-commutativity of quaternion multiplication and the complexity of quaternion singular value decomposition. To address the limitations encountered in prior works, we propose a quaternion nonlinear transform-induced tensor nuclear norm (QNTTNN) via a real embedding of quaternions, enabling tractable nuclear norm definitions and efficient optimization. Building upon QNTTNN, we formulate a quaternion tensor completion model and develop a proximal alternating minimization algorithm with rigorous convergence guarantees. Extensive experiments on benchmark color video inpainting datasets validate the superior performance of the proposed method over existing approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出四元数非线性变换张量核范数，用于彩色视频修复，性能优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有张量补全方法多基于线性变换或实数域非线性变换，无法有效处理四元数数据（如彩色图像/视频），而四元数能更好地保持通道间相关性。
analysis.problem: 如何将非线性变换张量核范数扩展到四元数域，以利用四元数结构进行低秩张量补全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过四元数的实嵌入定义四元数非线性变换张量核范数，并构建基于近端交替最小化算法的优化框架。
contributions: 提出四元数非线性变换张量核范数，克服了四元数乘法的非交换性和奇异值分解的复杂性。
设计具有收敛保证的优化算法，并在彩色视频修复数据集上验证了优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在基准彩色视频修复数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于四元数张量补全任务，泛化性未讨论。

papers.title: SplAttN: Bridging 2D and 3D with Gaussian Soft Splatting and Attention for Point Cloud Completion
papers.abstract: Although multi-modal learning has advanced point cloud completion, the theoretical mechanisms remain unclear. Recent works attribute success to the connection between modalities, yet we identify that standard hard projection severs this connection: projecting a sparse point cloud onto the image plane yields an extremely sparse support, which hinders visual prior propagation, a failure mode we term Cross-Modal Entropy Collapse. To address this practical limitation, we propose SplAttN, which replaces hard projection with Differentiable Gaussian Splatting to produce a dense, continuous image-plane representation. By reformulating projection as continuous density estimation, SplAttN avoids collapsed sparse support, facilitates gradient flow, and improves cross-modal connection learnability. Extensive experiments show that SplAttN achieves state-of-the-art performance on PCN and ShapeNet-55/34. Crucially, we utilize the real-world KITTI benchmark as a stress test for multi-modal reliance. Counter-factual evaluation reveals that while baselines degenerate into unimodal template retrievers insensitive to visual removal, SplAttN maintains a robust dependency on visual cues, validating that our method establishes an effective cross-modal connection. Code is available at https://github.com/zay002/SplAttN.

analysis.tldr: 提出可微高斯泼溅替代硬投影，解决点云补全中跨模态熵坍缩问题，实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态学习虽推进了点云补全，但理论机制不明，且标准硬投影导致稀疏支撑，阻碍视觉先验传播。
analysis.problem: 解决点云补全中硬投影造成的跨模态熵坍缩，即稀疏支撑导致视觉信息丢失和梯度流动困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出标准硬投影导致跨模态熵坍缩：稀疏点云投影到图像平面产生极稀疏支撑，阻碍视觉先验传播。
analysis.method: 提出SplAttN，用可微高斯泼溅替代硬投影，生成密集连续图像平面表示，将投影重定义为连续密度估计，避免稀疏支撑，促进梯度流动。
contributions: 识别并形式化点云补全中的跨模态熵坍缩问题
提出可微高斯泼溅投影方法，实现密集连续表示并改善跨模态连接可学习性
在PCN、ShapeNet-55/34上达到SOTA，并在KITTI上验证对视觉线索的鲁棒依赖
analysis.experiments: 在PCN、ShapeNet-55/34上达到SOTA，并在KITTI上进行反事实评估，验证方法对视觉线索的鲁棒依赖。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量图像输入
计算开销可能高于硬投影方法

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，在多个基准上SOTA，且提供代码，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微高斯泼溅替代硬投影，解决点云补全中跨模态熵坍缩问题，实现SOTA。

papers.title: SRGAN-CKAN: Expressive Super-Resolution with Nonlinear Functional Operators under Minimal Resources
papers.abstract: Single-Image Super-Resolution (SISR) aims to reconstruct a High-Resolution (HR) image from a Low-Resolution (LR) observation, a fundamentally ill-posed problem where high-frequency details are severely degraded at large upscaling factors. Recent advances have been driven by transformer-based architectures and diffusion models improve global context modeling and perceptual quality at the cost of increased computational complexity. In contrast, this work focuses on enhancing the expressivity of local operators under minimal resources. We propose SRGAN--CKAN, a hybrid super-resolution framework that integrates Convolutional Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (CKAN) into an adversarial learning setting reformulating convolution as a nonlinear patch-based transformation. The proposed operator replaces linear local mappings with spline-based functional representations, allowing expressive modeling of complex local structures and high-frequency textures using minimal hardware resources. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach improves perceptual quality while preserving reconstruction fidelity, achieving a favorable balance between distortion-based and perceptual metrics. These results are obtained under constrained computational settings, highlighting the efficiency of the proposed formulation. Overall, this work introduces a complementary direction to existing approaches by improving the representational power of local transformations, providing an efficient and scalable alternative to globally intensive architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出SRGAN-CKAN，用卷积KAN替换标准卷积，在极小资源下提升超分辨率表达力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SISR方法（Transformer、扩散模型）虽效果好但计算量大，难以在资源受限场景部署；而传统卷积局部表达能力有限，无法充分恢复高频细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在极小计算资源下提升单图像超分辨率中局部算子的表达能力，以重建高质量高频纹理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将卷积Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（CKAN）集成到GAN框架中，用基于样条的函数表示替换线性卷积，实现非线性局部变换。
contributions: 提出CKAN算子，将卷积重新表述为非线性基于块的变换，增强局部表达力。
构建SRGAN-CKAN混合框架，在极小资源下实现感知质量与保真度的平衡。

papers.title: CoFlow: Coordinated Few-Step Flow for Offline Multi-Agent Decision Making
papers.abstract: Generative models have emerged as a major paradigm for offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), but existing approaches require many iterative sampling steps. Recent few-step accelerations either distill a joint teacher into independent students or apply averaged velocities independently per agent, suggesting that few-step inference requires sacrificing inter-agent coordination. We show this trade-off is not necessary: single-pass multi-agent generation can preserve coordination when the velocity field is natively joint-coupled. We propose Coordinated few-step Flow (CoFlow), an architecture that combines Coordinated Velocity Attention (CVA) with Adaptive Coordination Gating. A finite-difference consistency surrogate further replaces memory-prohibitive Jacobian-vector product backpropagation through the averaged velocity field with two stop-gradient forward passes. Across 60 configurations spanning MPE, MA-MuJoCo, and SMAC, CoFlow matches or surpasses Gaussian / value-based, transformer, diffusion, and prior flow baselines on episodic return. Three independent coordination probes confirm that the gains flow through inter-agent coordination rather than per-agent capacity. A denoising-step sweep shows that single-pass inference suffices on every configuration. CoFlow reaches state-of-the-art coordination quality in 1-3 denoising steps under both centralized and decentralized execution. Project page: https://github.com/Guowei-Zou/coflow.

analysis.tldr: CoFlow 通过联合耦合速度场实现单步多智能体协调生成，无需牺牲协调性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离线多智能体强化学习生成模型需要大量迭代采样步骤，而少步加速方法通常牺牲智能体间的协调性，限制了实际应用效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在少步甚至单步生成过程中保持多智能体之间的协调性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有少步加速方法（如蒸馏或独立平均速度）暗示少步推理必须牺牲智能体间协调，但作者证明当速度场是原生联合耦合时，这种权衡并非必要。
analysis.method: 提出 Coordinated few-step Flow (CoFlow)，包含协调速度注意力（CVA）和自适应协调门控（Adaptive Coordination Gating），并使用有限差分一致性代理替代内存密集的雅可比向量积反向传播。
contributions: 证明单步多智能体生成可以在速度场联合耦合时保持协调性。
提出 CoFlow 架构，结合协调速度注意力和自适应协调门控，实现高效少步生成。
在 60 种配置上达到或超越多种基线，且单步推理在所有配置上均有效。
analysis.experiments: 在 MPE、MA-MuJoCo 和 SMAC 三个环境的 60 种配置上评估，与高斯/基于值、Transformer、扩散和先前的流基线对比，使用回合回报和三个独立的协调探针指标。
limitations: 可能对速度场的联合耦合设计有较高要求，扩展性待验证。
摘要未提及在更大规模智能体或复杂任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，在少步生成协调性上有突破，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoFlow 通过联合耦合速度场实现单步多智能体协调生成，无需牺牲协调性。

papers.title: Registration-Free Learnable Multi-View Capture of Faces in Dense Semantic Correspondence
papers.abstract: Recent frameworks like ToFu and TEMPEH provide an automated alternative to classical registration pipelines by predicting 3D meshes in dense semantic correspondence directly from calibrated multi-view images. However, these learning-based methods rely on the slow, manual registration pipelines they aim to replace for their training supervision. We overcome this limitation with MOCHI (Multi-view Optimizable Correspondence of Heads from Images), a multi-view 3D face prediction framework trained without requiring registered training data. MOCHI eliminates the registration data dependency by enforcing topological consistency through a pseudo-linear inverse kinematic solver. Semantic alignment is guided by dense keypoints from a 2D landmark predictor trained exclusively on synthetic data. Our analysis further reveals that standard point-to-surface distances induce training instabilities and visual artifacts in registration-free settings. We propose pointmap- and normal-based losses instead, which provide smoother gradients and superior reconstruction fidelity. Finally, we introduce a test-time optimization scheme that refines network weights over a few dozen iterations. This approach bridges the gap between feed-forward efficiency and iterative optimization precision, allowing MOCHI to outperform traditional labor-intensive pipelines in both reconstruction accuracy and visual quality. Code and model are public at: https://filby89.github.io/mochi.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需注册数据的多视角人脸3D重建框架MOCHI，通过拓扑一致性约束和2D关键点引导实现密集语义对应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学习型多视角人脸重建方法依赖传统手动注册管线生成训练数据，过程缓慢且成本高，限制了自动化方法的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖注册训练数据的情况下，从多视角图像预测具有密集语义对应的3D人脸网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准点-表面距离在无注册设置下导致训练不稳定和视觉伪影。
analysis.method: 提出MOCHI框架，通过伪线性逆运动学求解器强制拓扑一致性，利用仅在合成数据上训练的2D关键点预测器引导语义对齐，并采用点图和法线损失替代标准距离损失，最后引入测试时优化微调网络权重。
contributions: 首次实现无需注册训练数据的多视角人脸3D重建，消除数据依赖瓶颈。
提出点图和法线损失，解决无注册设置下的训练不稳定和伪影问题。
引入测试时优化方案，结合前馈效率与迭代优化精度，超越传统管线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在重建精度和视觉质量上优于传统人工管线。
limitations: 依赖2D关键点预测器，其性能可能受限于合成数据与真实数据的域差异。
测试时优化增加推理时间，可能不适用于实时场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决了注册数据依赖问题，但实验细节不足，影响评估受限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需注册数据的多视角人脸3D重建框架MOCHI，通过拓扑一致性约束和2D关键点引导实现密集语义对应。

papers.title: VisInject: Disruption != Injection -- A Dual-Dimension Evaluation of Universal Adversarial Attacks on Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Universal adversarial attacks on aligned multimodal large language models are increasingly reported with attack success rates in the 60-80% range, suggesting the visual modality is highly vulnerable to imperceptible perturbations as a prompt-injection channel. We argue that this number conflates two distinct events: (i) the model's output was perturbed (Influence), and (ii) the attacker's chosen target concept was actually emitted (Precise Injection). We compose two existing techniques -- Universal Adversarial Attack and AnyAttack -- under an $L_{inf}$ budget of 16/255, and we add a dual-axis evaluation: a deterministic Ratcliff-Obershelp drift score for Influence (programmatic baseline) plus a 4-tier ordinal categorical none/weak/partial/confirmed for Precise Injection. The judge is DeepSeek-V4-Pro in thinking mode, calibrated against Claude Opus 4.7 with Cohen's $κ$ = 0.77 on the injection axis (substantial agreement); the entire 4475-entry SHA-256 input cache ships with the dataset so reviewers can re-derive paper numbers bit-exact without an API key. Across 6615 pairs over four open VLMs, seven attack prompts, and seven test images, the two axes diverge by roughly 90$\times$: 66.4% of pairs are programmatically disturbed (LLM-judged 46.6% at the substantial-or-complete tier), but only 0.756% (50/6615) reach any non-none injection tier and only 0.030% (2/6615) verbatim. The few injections that do land cluster on screenshot- or document-style carriers whose semantics already invite text transcription. BLIP-2 shows \emph{zero detectable drift} at $L_{inf}$ = 16/255 across all 2205 pairs even when used as a Stage-1 surrogate. We release the full dataset -- 21 universal images, 147 adversarial photos, 6,615 response pairs, the v3 dual-axis judge results, and the cache at huggingface.co/datasets/jeffliulab/visinject.

analysis.tldr: 视觉语言模型对通用对抗攻击的鲁棒性被高估：攻击成功率混淆了“扰动”与“精确注入”，实际精确注入率仅0.756%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究声称对齐多模态大语言模型在通用对抗攻击下成功率高达60-80%，暗示视觉模态极易被微小扰动作为提示注入通道利用，但这种评估可能混淆了两种不同事件，导致对模型脆弱性的高估。
analysis.problem: 现有通用对抗攻击评估指标将模型输出被扰动（Influence）与攻击者目标概念被精确输出（Precise Injection）混为一谈，需要解耦这两个维度以准确评估视觉语言模型的实际脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在6615个测试对中，66.4%的样本输出被程序性扰动（LLM评判46.6%达到显著或完全级别），但仅0.756%（50/6615）达到任何非零注入级别，仅0.030%（2/6615）完全匹配目标文本；精确注入主要发生在截图或文档类载体上，其语义本身已包含文本转录；BLIP-2在L_inf=16/255下所有2205个测试对中检测到零漂移。
analysis.method: 提出双轴评估框架：使用确定性Ratcliff-Obershelp漂移分数衡量Influence（程序化基线），加上四级序数分类（无/弱/部分/确认）衡量Precise Injection；评判器为DeepSeek-V4-Pro思考模式，经Claude Opus 4.7校准（Cohen's κ=0.77）；整合Universal Adversarial Attack和AnyAttack两种技术，在L_inf=16/255预算下进行实验。
contributions: 提出双轴评估框架，将通用对抗攻击的影响（Influence）与精确注入（Precise Injection）解耦，揭示现有指标高估模型脆弱性。
发布完整数据集（21张通用图像、147张对抗照片、6615个响应对、双轴评判结果及SHA-256输入缓存），支持可复现研究。
通过大规模实验（4个开源VLM、7个攻击提示、7张测试图像）证明精确注入率极低（0.756%），且主要发生在语义上已包含文本转录的载体上。
analysis.experiments: 在4个开源视觉语言模型（包括BLIP-2等）、7个攻击提示、7张测试图像上，共6615个测试对，使用L_inf=16/255预算的Universal Adversarial Attack和AnyAttack方法，通过双轴评估框架进行实验。
limitations: 仅评估了开源VLM，未涉及闭源商业模型。
攻击预算固定为L_inf=16/255，未探索其他预算或攻击方法。
评判器依赖LLM（DeepSeek-V4-Pro），可能存在偏差，尽管已与Claude校准。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（双轴评估）且实验充分，对VLM安全评估有重要启示，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉语言模型对通用对抗攻击的鲁棒性被高估：攻击成功率混淆了“扰动”与“精确注入”，实际精确注入率仅0.756%。

papers.title: Decompose and Recompose: Reasoning New Skills from Existing Abilities for Cross-Task Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: Cross-task generalization is a core challenge in open-world robotic manipulation, and the key lies in extracting transferable manipulation knowledge from seen tasks. Recent in-context learning approaches leverage seen task demonstrations to generate actions for unseen tasks without parameter updates. However, existing methods provide only low-level continuous action sequences as context, failing to capture composable skill knowledge and causing models to degenerate into superficial trajectory imitation. We propose Decompose and Recompose, a skill reasoning framework using atomic skill-action pairs as intermediate representations. Our approach decomposes seen demonstrations into interpretable skill--action alignments, enabling the model to recompose these skills for unseen tasks through compositional reasoning. Specifically, we construct a task-adaptive dynamic demonstration library via visual-semantic retrieval combined with skill sequences from a planning agent, complemented by a coverage-aware static library to fill missing skill patterns. Together, these yield skill-comprehensive demonstrations that explicitly elicit compositional reasoning for skill composition and execution ordering. Experiments on the AGNOSTOS benchmark and real-world environments validate our method's zero-shot cross-task generalization capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出分解-重组框架，通过原子技能-动作对实现跨任务机器人操作的零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨任务泛化是开放世界机器人操作的核心挑战，现有上下文学习方法仅提供低级连续动作序列，无法捕获可组合的技能知识，导致模型退化为表面轨迹模仿。

papers.title: Rethinking Explanations: Formalizing Contrast in Description Logics
papers.abstract: There has been a growing interest in explaining entailments over description logic (DL) knowledge bases. The existing explanation formalisms focus on justifications to explain true axioms, and abductive reasoning to explain missing axioms in a knowledge base. However, these formalisms only point out the reasoning steps behind a (missing) entailment and lack a user-centered approach as they do not consider an inquirer's needs, level of understanding, or prior knowledge. We propose contrastive explanations, aiming at answering "why an axiom P (fact) is true instead of another axiom Q (foil)" over description logic knowledge bases. The motivation arises from the observation that when a user discovers that P has occurred, they are often surprised because they anticipated the occurrence of another similar event Q. Furthermore, individual explanations for "why P" and "why not Q" are unsatisfactory since a user expects to see the difference between P and Q. In this work, we first present formal foundations of contrasting questions and then define contrastive explanations within description logics. To this end, facts include ABox assertions of the form C(x) for a concept C and individual x. Possible foils for such facts are assertions C(y) (contrasting against an individual y), or D(x) (contrasting against a concept D). Additionally, we explore the properties of contrastive explanations in the DL EL and ALC. We also provide an implementation of our definition and an experimental evaluation on KBs of varying sizes.

analysis.tldr: 提出描述逻辑中的对比解释形式化框架，回答“为什么事实P成立而非另一个事实Q”的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有解释形式化（如justifications和溯因推理）仅指出推理步骤，缺乏以用户为中心的设计，未考虑用户先验知识或预期，导致用户对“为什么P而非Q”的对比需求无法满足。
analysis.problem: 如何在描述逻辑知识库中形式化并生成对比解释，以回答“为什么事实P成立而非另一个事实Q”的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户发现事实P时往往感到惊讶，因为他们预期的是另一个相似事件Q；单独解释“为什么P”和“为什么不是Q”无法满足用户期望看到P与Q差异的需求。
analysis.method: 提出对比解释的形式化定义，基于描述逻辑中的ABox断言（如C(x)），将事实P与备选事实Q（称为foil）进行对比；在DL EL和ALC中探索对比解释的性质，并给出实现和实验评估。
contributions: 首次形式化描述逻辑中的对比解释问题，定义对比问题与对比解释。
在DL EL和ALC中分析对比解释的性质，并提供实现与实验评估。
analysis.experiments: 在多种规模的知识库上进行了实验评估，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑ABox断言形式的对比，未覆盖TBox或复杂公理。
实验评估细节未在摘要中给出，可能缺乏大规模或真实场景验证。

papers.title: SCALE-LoRA: Auditing Post-Retrieval LoRA Composition with Residual Merging and View Reliability
papers.abstract: Libraries of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters are becoming a practical by-product of parameter-efficient adaptation. Once such adapters accumulate, a natural question is no longer how to train one adapter for one task, but how to reuse an open pool of adapters for a new task given only a small support set. Prior work has shown that LoRA modules can be composed at the task level and dynamically selected at the instance level. However, open-pool LoRA reuse is not automatic: retrieving relevant adapters does not guarantee that their parameter updates are compatible, and composing adapters does not guarantee reliable outputs. We introduce the Sparse-Composition Agreement Layer (SCALE), a post-retrieval audit and composition framework for open-pool LoRA reuse. SCALE contains a deployable 1.0* merge path, Layer-Adaptive Sparse Residual Composition (LASRC), and a higher-cost reliability-analysis layer for multi-view disagreement. LASRC addresses merge interference by preserving a linear anchor while residualizing block-wise adapter update directions. The reliability layer treats disagreement among sparse composition views as an observable uncertainty signal and compares agreement, support-loss proxy selection, and oracle headroom under explicit path cost. In matched FLAN-T5-Large, BIG-Bench Hard (BBH), and 97-LoRA experiments, LASRC gives a directional single-view gain under fixed retrieval, while SCALE-support is reported as a query-label-free 3.0* reliability-analysis variant rather than as a calibrated or throughput-equivalent selector. Protocol-distinct BBH-8 validation shows the same qualitative trend on three decoder-only backbones. Detailed scores, paired audits, and path-cost records are reported in the experimental section.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCALE框架，通过残差合并与视图可靠性分析审计后检索LoRA组合中的干扰与不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA适配器库积累后，如何自动复用开放池中的适配器以支持新任务成为关键问题，但检索到的适配器参数更新可能不兼容，组合输出不可靠。
analysis.problem: 解决开放池LoRA复用中检索后适配器组合的兼容性审计与可靠性评估问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出检索相关适配器不保证参数兼容，组合适配器不保证输出可靠，存在合并干扰和不确定性。
analysis.method: 提出SCALE框架，包含可部署的1.0×合并路径（LASRC）和更高成本的多视图不一致可靠性分析层；LASRC通过保留线性锚点并对块级适配器更新方向进行残差化来缓解合并干扰。
contributions: 提出SCALE，一个后检索审计与组合框架，用于开放池LoRA复用。
设计LASRC方法，通过残差合并减少适配器组合中的干扰。
引入基于多视图不一致的可靠性分析层，作为可观测的不确定性信号。
analysis.experiments: 在FLAN-T5-Large、BIG-Bench Hard和97-LoRA实验中，LASRC在固定检索下取得定向单视图增益；SCALE-support作为无查询标签的3.0×可靠性分析变体报告；在三个仅解码器骨干上验证了BBH-8协议。
limitations: 可靠性分析层成本较高，可能限制实际部署。
实验仅在有限数据集和模型上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。

papers.title: Quantifying Multimodal Capabilities: Formal Generalization Guarantees in Pairwise Metric Learning
papers.abstract: Multimodal learning leverages the integration of diverse data modalities to enhance performance in complex tasks. Yet, it frequently encounters incomplete or redundant modality data in real-world scenarios. This paper presents a fine-grained theoretical analysis of the generalization properties of multimodal metric learning models, addressing critical gaps in understanding the relationship between modality selection and algorithmic performance. We establish hierarchical relationships between function classes corresponding to different modality subsets and quantify the discrepancy between learned mappings and ground truth. Through rigorous analysis of pairwise complexity within the multimodal learning framework, we derive novel generalization error bounds that reveal the joint impact of modality quantity and granularity on model performance. Our theoretical findings on both upper and lower bounds demonstrate that incorporating fine-grained modality features reduces the complexity of the hypothesis space by enhancing modality complementarity. This work offers both theoretical foundations and practical implications for improving convergence rates and accuracy in multimodal learning systems.

analysis.tldr: 本文从理论上分析了多模态度量学习中的泛化性质，建立了模态子集函数类的层次关系，并推导了泛化误差界。

papers.title: HepScript: A Dual-Use DSL for Human-AI Collaborative Data Analysis Workflows in High-Energy Physics
papers.abstract: The escalating data scale in High-Energy Physics (HEP) fuels a growing aspiration for higher analytical efficiency. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a path toward automation via agentic AI, they struggle with complex scientific workflows that require deep domain knowledge and are tightly coupled to experiment-specific codebases. To address this, we introduce a methodology centered on HepScript, a dual-use Domain-Specific Language (DSL) for HEP data analysis workflows. HepScript serves as a shared formal interface, abstracting HEP analysis logic into a constrained syntax that is both intuitive for human experts and reliably generable by AI agents. First developed for the Beijing Spectrometer III (BESIII) experiment, HepScript hides the complexity of the underlying software stack, translating high-level analysis intent into low-level, production-ready code. In our case studies, this abstraction reduces the required human-written code by 93\%. Crucially, HepScript's constrained grammar defines a tractable action space, enabling AI agents to autonomously generate executable specifications for core analysis stages directly from published literature with a 95\% success rate. Our work demonstrates a scalable pathway toward human-AI collaborative systems, where a formally specified DSL acts as an unambiguous translation layer between human expertise, AI automation, and production environment, rendering previously intractable automation problems solvable.

analysis.tldr: 提出HepScript双用途DSL，作为人类与AI在HEP数据分析中的共享接口，显著减少代码量并实现高成功率自动化。
analysis.research_motivation: 高能物理数据规模激增，传统分析效率低；LLM虽能自动化但难以处理需深度领域知识和实验特定代码的复杂科学工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种形式化接口，使人类专家和AI代理都能可靠地表达和生成HEP数据分析工作流。

papers.title: Artificial Jagged Intelligence as Uneven Optimization Energy Allocation Capability Concentration, Redistribution, and Optimization Governance
papers.abstract: Artificial Jagged Intelligence (AJI) denotes a recurring pattern in which large learning systems exhibit strong local capabilities while remaining weak or brittle in other domains. This paper develops a formal theory of AJI as uneven allocation of optimization pressure. We model training as a finite-budget process that distributes gradient-driven update energy across capability-relevant directions in parameter space. In this model, jagged capability profiles arise from anisotropic objective structure, data geometry, and representational coupling rather than from a single scalar quantity called intelligence. The paper defines capability gain, optimization energy share, and jaggedness, then proves that persistent concentration of cumulative update energy yields lower bounds on dispersion in capability gains. A finite-budget tradeoff theorem shows why prioritizing one capability can impose opportunity costs on others unless positive coupling or shared structure offsets the cost. The analysis also studies redistribution mechanisms, including energy-variance regularization and auxiliary structural objectives, as interventions that reshape the optimization field. The resulting framework links uneven emergence, training architecture, and optimization governance. It predicts that early concentration of update energy should forecast later capability jaggedness; that scaling under a narrow objective need not eliminate anisotropy; and that explicitly funded auxiliary objectives can revive neglected capabilities. AJI is therefore not merely a descriptive label for uneven model behavior, but a testable theory of how finite optimization resources produce concentrated, delayed, and structurally uneven capability formation.

analysis.tldr: 提出人工锯齿智能（AJI）理论，将模型能力不均衡归因于优化能量分配不均，并证明有限预算下的权衡定理。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型学习系统常表现出局部强能力而其他领域脆弱的锯齿状能力分布，现有研究缺乏对这一现象的正式理论解释和量化分析。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化描述和解释大型学习系统中能力分布不均衡（锯齿智能）的成因，并设计干预机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出锯齿能力轮廓源于各向异性目标结构、数据几何和表征耦合，而非单一智能标量；早期优化能量集中会预测后期能力锯齿度。
analysis.method: 将训练建模为有限预算过程，定义能力增益、优化能量份额和锯齿度，证明能量持续集中导致能力增益分散的下界，提出有限预算权衡定理，并研究能量方差正则化和辅助结构目标等再分配机制。
contributions: 形式化定义人工锯齿智能（AJI）为优化压力不均匀分配的理论框架
证明有限预算权衡定理，揭示能力优先级间的机会成本
提出能量方差正则化和辅助目标作为重塑优化场的干预机制

papers.title: TimeTok: Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation via Hierarchical Tokenization
papers.abstract: Time-series generative models often lack control over temporal granularity, forcing users to accept whatever granularity the model produces. To enable truly user-driven generation, we introduce TimeTok, a unified framework for Granularity-Controllable Time-Series Generation (GC-TSG), which generates time series at any target granularity from any coarser input (e.g., rough sketches) or from scratch. At the core of TimeTok is a hierarchical tokenization strategy that maps time series into an ordered sequence of tokens, from coarse to fine temporal granularity. Our autoregressive generation process operates across these granularity levels, producing token blocks that are decoded back into continuous time series. This design naturally enables GC-TSG - including standard generation - within a single framework, where controlling the number of token blocks provides explicit control over output detail. Experiments show that TimeTok excels at GC-TSG tasks while achieving state-of-the-art performance in standard generation. Furthermore, we showcase TimeTok's potential as a foundational tokenizer by training on multiple datasets with heterogeneous temporal granularities, verifying strong transferability that consistently outperforms models trained on individual datasets. To our knowledge, this is the first unified framework that covers the full generative spectrum for time series, offering a valuable foundation for models that benefit from diverse temporal granularities.

analysis.tldr: TimeTok通过层次化分词策略实现时间序列在任意时间粒度上的可控生成，支持从粗略草图或零开始生成，并在标准生成任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列生成模型缺乏对时间粒度的控制，用户只能接受模型输出的固定粒度，无法满足多样化的应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现用户可控的时间粒度时间序列生成，即从任意粗粒度输入（如粗略草图）或从零开始生成任意目标粒度的时间序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TimeTok框架，核心是层次化分词策略，将时间序列映射为从粗到细的有序token序列；自回归生成过程跨粒度级别生成token块，通过控制token块数量显式控制输出细节。
contributions: 首次提出粒度可控时间序列生成（GC-TSG）任务并构建统一框架TimeTok。
层次化分词策略实现从粗到细的粒度控制，支持标准生成和GC-TSG。
在多个异构粒度数据集上训练，验证了作为基础分词器的强迁移性，优于单数据集训练模型。
analysis.experiments: 在GC-TSG任务和标准生成任务上进行实验，TimeTok在GC-TSG任务中表现优异，并在标准生成任务上达到SOTA；同时在多个异构粒度数据集上训练，验证了强迁移性。
limitations: 可能对极长序列或极高粒度控制的计算开销较大。
层次化分词策略的粒度级别数需要手动设定，可能影响灵活性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，首次解决时间序列粒度控制问题，实验充分且达到SOTA，与时间序列生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TimeTok通过层次化分词策略实现时间序列在任意时间粒度上的可控生成，支持从粗略草图或零开始生成，并在标准生成任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Medmarks: A Comprehensive Open-Source LLM Benchmark Suite for Medical Tasks
papers.abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) for medical applications remains challenging due to benchmark saturation, limited data accessibility, and insufficient coverage of relevant tasks. Existing suites have either saturated, heavily depend on restricted datasets, or lack comprehensive model coverage. We introduce Medmarks, a fully open-source evaluation suite with 30 benchmarks spanning question answering, information extraction, medical calculations, and open-ended clinical reasoning. We perform a systematic evaluation of 61 models across 71 configurations using verifiable metrics and LLM-as-a-Judge. Our results show that frontier reasoning models (Gemini 3 Pro Preview, GPT-5.1, & GPT-5.2) achieve the highest performance across both benchmarks, most frontier proprietary models are significantly more token efficient than open-weight alternatives, medically fine-tuned models outperform their generalist counterparts, and that models are susceptible to answer-order bias (particularly smaller models and Grok 4). A subset of our evals (Medmarks-T) can be directly used as reinforcement learning environments to post-train LLMs for medical reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/MedARC-AI/Medmarks

analysis.tldr: Medmarks 是一个面向医学任务的全面开源 LLM 基准套件，包含 30 个基准，系统评估了 61 个模型，发现前沿推理模型性能最高，且模型存在答案顺序偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学 LLM 评估套件存在基准饱和、数据访问受限、任务覆盖不足等问题，亟需一个全面、开源、可扩展的评估平台。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖广泛医学任务、使用可验证指标、且完全开源的 LLM 评估基准套件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿推理模型性能最高；大多数前沿专有模型比开源模型更节省 token；医学微调模型优于通用模型；模型（尤其是小模型和 Grok 4）存在答案顺序偏差。
analysis.method: 构建包含 30 个基准的评估套件，涵盖问答、信息抽取、医学计算和开放式临床推理，使用可验证指标和 LLM-as-a-Judge 对 61 个模型（71 种配置）进行系统评估。
contributions: 提出 Medmarks，一个完全开源、覆盖 30 个医学任务的 LLM 基准套件。
对 61 个模型进行系统评估，揭示了前沿模型性能、token 效率、微调效果和答案顺序偏差等关键发现。
提供 Medmarks-T 子集，可直接用作强化学习环境以对 LLM 进行医学推理的后训练。
analysis.experiments: 在 30 个基准上评估了 61 个模型（71 种配置），使用可验证指标和 LLM-as-a-Judge。
limitations: 基准套件可能仍存在覆盖不足，例如某些专科医学任务未包含。
LLM-as-a-Judge 的可靠性可能受限于评估模型本身的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该工作提供了全面的医学 LLM 基准和系统评估，具有实用价值，但方法创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Medmarks 是一个面向医学任务的全面开源 LLM 基准套件，包含 30 个基准，系统评估了 61 个模型，发现前沿推理模型性能最高，且模型存在答案顺序偏差。

papers.title: AI Safety as Control of Irreversibility: A Systems Framework for Decision-Energy and Sovereignty Boundaries
papers.abstract: Recent AI systems compress the distance between capability growth and capability deployment. Earlier high-risk technologies were slowed by capital intensity, physical bottlenecks, organizational inertia, and specialized supply chains. By contrast, AI capabilities can be copied, invoked, embedded in workflows, and scaled across institutions at low marginal cost. This paper argues that declining deployment friction changes the safety problem at its root. Safety is not only local output correctness or preference alignment, but the control of irreversibility under rising decision density. The paper formalizes this claim through decision-energy density: the rate-weighted capacity of a node to generate, evaluate, select, and execute consequential decisions. It then identifies three sovereignty boundaries that determine whether AI remains an amplifier within a human-governed system or becomes a de facto control center: irreversible decision authority, physical resource mobilization authority, and self-expansion authority. The model shows how efficiency pressure, path dependence, scale feedback, and weak boundary constraints concentrate decision-energy in the most efficient node. This concentration can diffuse responsibility and raise the probability of irreversible system-level loss even when local per-action error rates remain low. The main result is a boundary stabilization theorem. It shows that safety need not require proving that advanced systems are always correct. Instead, it requires institutional and technical designs that prevent irreversible power from being released by a single high-efficiency node. The paper reframes AI safety as layered control, authorization, and externally reviewable limits, linking alignment, security engineering, organizational economics, and institutional design.

analysis.tldr: 将AI安全重新定义为对不可逆性的控制，通过决策能量密度和主权边界的形式化框架，论证了降低部署摩擦如何改变安全问题的本质。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统高风险的物理技术受限于资本密集度和物理瓶颈，而AI能力可以低成本复制和扩展，导致部署摩擦急剧下降，这从根本上改变了安全问题的性质，需要新的理论框架。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化描述和解决AI系统因低部署摩擦和高决策密度导致的不可逆性失控风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，效率压力、路径依赖、规模反馈和弱边界约束会将决策能量集中在最高效的节点上，即使局部错误率很低，也可能导致不可逆的系统级损失。
analysis.method: 提出了决策能量密度（decision-energy density）和三个主权边界（不可逆决策权、物理资源动员权、自我扩展权）的形式化框架，并证明了边界稳定定理。
contributions: 将AI安全重新定义为对不可逆性的控制，而非仅关注局部正确性或偏好对齐。
提出了决策能量密度和主权边界的形式化模型，并证明了边界稳定定理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架高度抽象，缺乏实证验证。
未讨论具体实现或工程化路径。

analysis.reason: 理论框架新颖且具有跨学科深度，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读以理解其思想。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将AI安全重新定义为对不可逆性的控制，通过决策能量密度和主权边界的形式化框架，论证了降低部署摩擦如何改变安全问题的本质。

papers.title: Interactive Multi-Turn Retrieval for Health Videos
papers.abstract: The growing availability of health-related instructional videos creates new opportunities for clinical training, patient rehabilitation, and health education, yet existing retrieval systems remain largely single-turn: a user submits one query and receives one ranked list. This interaction is brittle in health scenarios, where information needs are often vague at first and become clinically meaningful only after follow-up constraints such as posture, hand placement, contraindications, equipment, or patient condition are specified. We introduce interactive multi-turn semantic retrieval for health videos and construct MHVRC, a Multi-Turn Health Video Retrieval Corpus, by combining video-grounded descriptions from VideoChat-Flash with query refinements generated by DeepSeek. We further propose DATR, a Dialogue-Aware Two-Stage Retrieval framework. DATR first performs efficient coarse retrieval with a CLIP-style dual encoder and sparse frame sampling, then re-ranks the top candidates through multi-turn query fusion and a lightweight cross-encoder scoring module. Experiments on MHVRC show consistent gains over strong text-video retrieval baselines, while user studies indicate that refined multi-turn queries better capture fine-grained procedural semantics than single-turn annotations. The work establishes a benchmark and a scalable technical recipe for interactive health video retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 提出交互式多轮健康视频检索方法，构建数据集MHVRC和两阶段检索框架DATR。
analysis.research_motivation: 健康视频检索中用户需求常模糊且需多轮细化，现有单轮检索系统无法满足临床训练、康复等场景的复杂约束。
analysis.problem: 解决健康视频检索中单轮交互脆弱、无法处理多轮细化查询的问题。

提出对话感知两阶段检索框架DATR，在MHVRC上优于强基线

papers.title: AMSnet-q: Unsupervised Circuit Identification and Performance Labeling for AMS Circuits
papers.abstract: Analog and mixed-signal (AMS) circuit design remains heavily reliant on expert knowledge. While recent AI-driven automation tools can generate candidate topologies, they critically depend on manually curated datasets with functional and performance annotations -- a requirement that current large language models (LLMs) and vision models cannot automate. Existing approaches still require domain experts to manually interpret circuit functionality. We present AMSnet-q, a fully automated, unsupervised pipeline that eliminates human-in-the-loop annotation by converting schematic images directly into a labeled AMS circuit database. Unlike prior work that stops at netlist extraction, our framework automates the complete verification loop: it performs schematic-to-netlist conversion, topology-aware testbench generation, and simulation-based sizing validation to objectively determine circuit functionality. Validated in 28 nm technology, AMSnet-q processed 739 schematics from the AMSnet 1.0 dataset, automatically constructing a repository of 4 circuit classes, 105 distinct topologies, and 89,789 labeled device configurations. By decoupling human effort from dataset volume and reducing the workload to a one-time testbench template per circuit class, AMSnet-q enables scalable, objective, and fully automated AMS database construction.

analysis.tldr: 提出全自动无监督流水线AMSnet-q，将AMS电路原理图自动转换为带功能与性能标注的数据库，无需人工介入。
analysis.research_motivation: AMS电路设计依赖专家知识，现有AI工具需要人工标注数据集，而LLM和视觉模型无法自动化这一过程，导致数据集构建成为瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何实现AMS电路原理图到带功能与性能标注数据库的完全自动化转换，消除人工标注环节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Injecting Distributional Awareness into MLLMs via Reinforcement Learning for Deep Imbalanced Regression
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) struggle with numerical regression under long-tailed target distributions. Token-level supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and point-wise regression rewards bias learning toward high-density regions, leading to regression-to-the-mean behavior and poor tail performance. We identify the lack of cross-sample relational supervision as a key limitation of existing MLLM training paradigms. To address it, we propose a distribution-aware reinforcement learning framework based on Group Relative Policy Optimization, which introduces batch-level comparison-based supervision via the Concordance Correlation Coefficient-based reward to align predicted and ground-truth distributions in terms of correlation, scale, and mean. The framework is plug-and-play, requiring no architectural modification. Experiments on a unified suite of long-tailed regression benchmarks show consistent improvements over SFT and existing MLLM regression methods, with particularly strong gains in medium- and few-shot regimes.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习引入分布感知，提升多模态大模型在长尾回归任务中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在长尾目标分布下的数值回归任务中表现不佳，现有监督微调和点式回归奖励偏向高密度区域，导致回归到均值行为和尾部性能差。
analysis.problem: 现有MLLM训练范式缺乏跨样本关系监督，无法有效处理长尾回归问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基于token的监督微调和点式回归奖励会导致模型偏向高密度区域，产生回归到均值行为，尾部性能差。
analysis.method: 提出基于组相对策略优化的分布感知强化学习框架，通过基于一致性相关系数的奖励引入批次级比较监督，对齐预测分布与真实分布的相关性、尺度和均值。
contributions: 识别了现有MLLM训练范式缺乏跨样本关系监督的关键局限性。
提出了即插即用的分布感知强化学习框架，无需架构修改。

limitations: 可能对批次大小敏感，影响分布对齐效果。

papers.title: AI Expert Twin: Capturing Expert Cognition for Human-Centred, Practice-Based Learning
papers.abstract: Tacit knowledge embedded in expert practice remains difficult to capture, formalise, and scale. While AI-driven educational systems have advanced personalisation, learner modelling, affective support, and self-regulated learning, they less often model the tacit reasoning and context-sensitive judgement that underpin expert practice in practice-based domains. This paper introduces the AI Expert Twin, a cognition-centric framework that models expert knowledge as structured, computable representations of procedural actions, semantic concepts, and decision processes. The framework also considers how value-laden preferences, trade-offs, and uncertainty shape expert judgement in practice. We formalise expert cognition as a three-layer representation and capture knowledge from experts under this model, laying the groundwork for integration into AI-powered educational system. A case study in a cultural heritage workshop demonstrates the feasibility of the approach in a real-world setting. The framework is designed to be transferable across domains such as vocational education and creative industries. By embedding expert heuristics into AI while maintaining transparency and learner agency, the AI Expert Twin offers a novel path towards scalable, practice-based learning and invites further research on ethical, human-centred applications of AI in education.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI专家孪生框架，将专家隐性知识建模为可计算的三层表征，用于实践导向学习。
